title: Content Marketing Coordinator + Customer Support
description:
We are mission-driven children’s brand. This role supports our organic growth by executing SEO + blog content, tracking keyword and content performance weekly, improving landing pages for conversion, and publishing transactional/inventory-driven updates (IG Stories + Shopify messaging). You’ll also provide scheduled customer service backup 1–2 days/week using templates.



We’re looking for someone who is creative and performance-driven: a strong writer with strong Canva skills, who understands AIEO (AI search optimization), funnels, and conversion—then turns insights into clear improvements.



Core Responsibilities

1) SEO + AIEO Blog Content (Primary)

* Write and publish 1–2 SEO-optimized blog posts per week (occasionally 3 during peak seasons).

* Use keyword research (ex: Ubersuggest) to select topics aligned with search intent and purchase intent.

* Optimize content for modern discovery and AIEO:

    * Clear structure, concise answers, strong headings

    * Snippet-friendly formatting and FAQ sections

    * Helpful, culturally respectful explanations for parents and educators

* Ensure every post includes:

    * Internal links to relevant product/collection pages

    * Strong CTAs that move readers into the funnel

    * Optimized meta title/meta description and alt text

* Refresh older posts monthly (update, expand, improve internal links, strengthen conversion paths).

2) Weekly Tracking: Keywords + Content Performance

* Track priority keywords weekly and report movement + actions being taken.

* Monitor performance using Google Analytics (GA4) and, when available, Google Search Console:

    * Organic sessions, landing page performance, bounce rate, time on page

    * Queries/pages with high impressions but low clicks (CTR opportunity)

    * Posts that rank but don’t convert (CTA and funnel fixes)

* Maintain a simple tracking sheet (keywords, URLs, rankings, insights, next steps).

3) Funnels, Conversions, and Landing Page Improvements

* Improve the content funnel from blog ? collection/product pages ? checkout:

    * CTAs, internal linking, recommended products, clarity improvements

* Support ongoing landing page improvements:

    * Rewrite sections for clarity and conversion

    * Add FAQ blocks, trust signals, comparisons, and “what’s included” sections

    * Improve structure for mobile readability

* Create simple on-site resources that increase conversion (ex: guides, checklists, printables).

4) Shopify + Bloggle + Shopify Messaging

* Publish blogs using Bloggle + Shopify, ensuring correct formatting, SEO fields, and internal linking.

* Create and publish Shopify messaging content as assigned (announcements, banners, on-site clarity messaging).

5) Canva (Strong Skills Required)

* Create polished Canva assets aligned with brand templates:

    * Blog feature images, IG story slides, simple website graphics, printables

* Maintain a clean Canva file system (naming conventions, folders, reusable templates).

6) Instagram Stories + Transactional Organic Updates

* Publish inventory/transactional updates using templates:

    * Low stock / last chance

    * Back in stock / restocks

    * Surveys, quick announcements, seasonal reminders

* Keep Stories active using interactive formats (polls, questions, stickers).

* Repurpose blog/campaign content into Stories and simple posts.

7) ManyChat Support (Bonus / Support)

* Support ManyChat flows as assigned (basic updates, keyword triggers, link checks, quick edits).

* Coordinate with the team to ensure ManyChat messages match current promotions and inventory availability.

8) Customer Service Cross-Support (1–2 Days/Week)

* Provide customer service coverage 1–2 scheduled days per week, primarily for:

    * Order status + shipping questions

    * Product questions

    * Basic troubleshooting (discount codes, checkout issues)

* Respond using saved templates/macros and escalate exceptions as needed.

* Flag repeated questions so we can improve FAQs, product pages, and automated replies.

* Availability 10-2PM Eastern Standard Time 



Tools You’ll Use (Required)

* Shopify (blogs, pages, content updates)

* Bloggle

* Ubersuggest

* Google Analytics (GA4)

* Google Search Console (if available)

* Canva (advanced)

* ClickUp (tasks, SOPs, approvals)

* ManyChat (support level)



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)

* Basic Shopify “developer-minded” skills (comfortable reviewing issues and coordinating fixes)

* Ability to review Hotjar / Microsoft Clarity recordings and identify conversion blockers

* Suggest and implement fixes such as:

    * Copy clarity improvements

    * Mobile layout and hierarchy suggestions

    * CTA placement improvements

    * Form friction reduction

    * Navigation and scroll behavior improvements

* Familiarity with Klaviyo (repurposing content, basic QA, campaign support)

* Experience with A/B testing or conversion testing tools

* Ability to create simple printables/resources that support education + conversion

* Help edit videos for social media 



Success Criteria (KPIs)

* SEO/AIEO output: 1–2 SEO blog posts/week with strong structure + internal links

* Tracking cadence: weekly keyword + content performance reporting with actions taken

* Organic growth: organic sessions trend upward vs monthly targets

* Conversion improvements: measurable lifts on priority landing pages (CTR, add-to-cart, conversion rate where possible)

* Instagram: consistent Stories + timely inventory updates; track traffic contribution

* Customer support: 1–2 coverage days/week completed; recurring FAQs surfaced weekly



Requirements

* Strong English writing skills + ability to match a warm, parent-friendly brand voice

* Strong Canva skills (you can produce clean, polished assets quickly)

* SEO fundamentals + AIEO understanding

* Conversion and funnel understanding (content > landing > checkout)

* Organized, consistent, and comfortable working from SOPs/templates



To apply please include:

* A short note about your SEO + conversion experience

* 2–3 writing samples (blog links preferred)

* Resume outlining your experience

* A Canva portfolio link or 3–5 examples

* Confirmation of availability 10-2pm (EST)

* Short & long-term goals

title: Operations Lead / Integrator (GM Track)
description:
RCII is a multi-brand, multi-channel business operating in the natural beauty and wellness space. We are entering a phase where operational excellence, clarity, and speed matter more than effort or intent. This role exists to own operations end-to-end, reduce founder dependency, and bring order, prioritization, and execution discipline to a growing business.

This is not a long term coordinator or support role. It is designed for someone who wants to become a right hand to the founder and grow into a General Manager / Integrator role over time.



You might be a fit if:

You like being accountable for outcomes, not just tasks

You are calm under pressure and decisive when things are unclear

You enjoy building systems, prioritizing work, and making tradeoffs

You naturally think in terms of risk, impact, and leverage

You are comfortable making decisions without perfect information

You want increasing ownership and responsibility over time

You are comfortable being the person who makes the call — even when the founder isn’t available



This role is NOT a fit if:

You prefer being given tasks rather than defining priorities

You need frequent reassurance or validation to perform well

You enjoy marketing, brand storytelling, or creative work more than operations

You avoid difficult decisions or accountability for results



What you will own:

Inventory planning, forecasting, and replenishment decisions

Operational systems (Shopify, Amazon, inventory tools, Monday, reporting)

Managing wholesale orders and relationships

Cross-functional prioritization between inventory, customer service, marketing, and fulfillment

Identifying risks before they become problems (stockouts, overstocks, delays, data issues)

Creating clarity where processes are messy or undefined

Ensuring leadership always has a clear view of what matters most



You will be expected to:

See problems early

Make recommendations confidently

Take ownership of fixing issues end-to-end

Communicate proactively when tradeoffs or risks exist



What success looks like (first 12 months):

Inventory decisions are accurate, timely, and proactive

Weekly operational reporting happens without being chased

Systems reflect reality, not intention

Fewer emergencies and less reactive decision-making

The founder is no longer the operational bottleneck

You are trusted to run operations independently



How this role grows:

This role is intentionally designed as an Integrator / GM track position.



Over time, success in this role may expand into:

Owning broader financial and operational KPIs

Managing contractors or tea
mbers

Leading planning and execution across departments

Acting as second-in-command when the founder is unavailable

Growth is based on demonstrated ownership, judgment, and results — not tenure.



Required experience:

Proven experience owning operations, inventory, or supply-chain-related outcomes in an e-commerce or consumer product business

Experience working with imperfect data and making reasonable assumptions

Comfort working directly with founders or senior leadership

Strong analytical and prioritization skills

Experience with Shopify, Amazon and inventory systems

Experience in natural beauty, wellness, or regulated consumer products is helpful but not required.



We are a small, high-trust team. This role requires:

Direct, respectful communication

Comfort receiving and acting on feedback quickly

Accountability without defensiveness

Respect for operating in a mission-driven, values-led business

Professionalism over ego

You do not need to live a "natural" lifestyle — but you must respect customer trust, transparency, and operational rigor.

title: Bookkeeper / Accountant Pacific Time Zone
description:
Job Title: Full-Time Bookkeeper / Accountant ( Pacific Time Zone Availability Required)



Company Overview:



We are a US-landscape company with real estate holdings. 



We are seeking a dedicated, experienced Filipino virtual professional to fully own the bookkeeping across these entities. 



This full-time role combines hands-on bookkeeping with accountant-level oversight and CFO-minded strategic support.



You will ensure books are accurate, CPA-ready, and provide actionable financial insights for decision-making. The role requires strong independence, professional judgment, and full accountability. Prior experience with US-based or multi-entity businesses is highly valued.



Important: Availability during Pacific Time Zone (PST/PDT) business hours is required for real-time collaboration, follow-ups, and alignment with US operations.



Key Responsibilities:



Daily and Operational Accounting:



Enter and code receipts, bills, checks, debits, and credits into QuickBooks Desktop (QBD) and Aspire (once implemented), with correct class, customer, and job classifications.

Perform daily reconciliations with vendor bills, statements, bank/credit card accounts for accuracy.

Manage full Accounts Payable (A/P) and Accounts Receivable (A/R): run reports, process payments per SOPs, handle credit memos and applications.

Organize and file receipts digitally.

Follow up promptly with personnel on incomplete or uncoded items.

Review, post, and reconcile bank/credit card transactions daily and monthly.

Manage clearing accounts, timing differences, owner distributions, and equity transactions.



Month-End and Financial Close:



Prepare and post journal entries (accruals, depreciation, reclassifications, corrections, equity adjustments).

Generate, review, and stand behind monthly financial statements (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet) – clean, consistent, and defensible.

Close books accurately within two weeks of month-end.

Maintain fixed asset and depreciation schedules per CPA.

Proactively identify, investigate, and correct errors or misclassifications.



Compliance, Controls, and Tax Support:



Implement and enforce robust accounting controls and review processes.

Keep books audit-ready, consistent month-over-month, and fully prepared for CPA/tax reviews.

Prepare data for tax compliance (sales tax, payroll tax, etc.) and support CPA with annual filings, year-end reviews, or inquiries.

Flag risks, inconsistencies, or structural issues early.



Strategic Financial Oversight and Advisory:



Oversee budgeting, forecasting, and tracking systems (including Google Sheets controls).

Reconcile QuickBooks with external tools (budget sheets, CRM, etc.) monthly and explain variances.

Deliver insights on cash flow, cost control, and operational decisions.

Recommend process, reporting, or structural improvements as businesses grow.

Act as go-to expert for financial questions, making informed judgment calls and explaining impacts clearly.



Additional:



Support smooth transition to Aspire software.

Collaborate across entities, prioritizing GLAD while giving equal attention to real estate.



Who We're Looking For:



A seasoned professional who is not just a bookkeeper, but thinks like an Accountant/CFO—not just a task executor. You own the financial function end-to-end with confidence.



Must-Have Qualifications:



Proven Accounting Manager with full book ownership.

Extensive hands-on QuickBooks Desktop expertise (reconciliations, journal entries, A/P-A/R, equity, CPA-ready financials).

Proficiency with Google Sheets for controls/reporting.

Experience in service-based, real estate, or multi-entity environments preferred.

Strong independent judgment, accountability, and proactive mindset.

Excellent English (written/verbal) for clear communication.

Philippines-based with reliable internet and back-up computers/generators



Preferred:



Familiarity with Aspire or similar industry software.

US client or multi-business experience.



Time Commitment and Compensation:



Full-time- Must align with Pacific Time Zone business hours for meetings, follow-ups, and real-time collaboration—typically 8 AM–5 PM PST/PDT availability required).

Outcomes-focused: accuracy, ownership, and timeliness 

Long-term role with growth potential as businesses expand.

Competitive monthly salary in PHP (please state your expected rate in your application).



What's Important to Us:



Accuracy + efficiency.

True ownership and proactive accountability.

Independent operation with sound judgment.

Month-to-month consistency.

Professional, clear communication.



How to Apply:



To show attention to detail, follow this format exactly. 



Subject Line: Full-Time Virtual Accountant / Controller Application – Your Full Name



 Body / Application (include all):



Brief video introduction (2–3 minutes max) covering:

Your Bookkeeper/Accountant/CFO-level experience.

Years hands-on with QuickBooks Desktop.

Types of companies/businesses you've managed finances for.

Resume (PDF).

Cover letter: Why you're ideal for this combined role, confirmation of Pacific Time Zone availability, and your expected monthly salary in PHP.



We look forward to hearing from strong candidates ready to own this important function!

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Work for the Highest-Rated Dog Training Company in the U.S.

Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term

$5- $6/hr + KPI Bonuses



About Us



Team Sam Ivy is the #1 highest-rated dog training company in the United States, with 1,000+ verified 5-star Google reviews.

We help dog owners solve serious behavior issues (aggression, reactivity, separation anxiety, destructive behavior, etc.) through a unique owner-coaching system.



We are expanding and looking for professional, eloquent Appointment Setters to join our remote team.



Work Schedule (PH Time) — WEEKDAY ROLE:

You will work Monday–Friday:

05:00 AM – 12:00 Ap PHT

(corresponds to 04:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST)



Weekends OFF



Role Overview:



You will:

- Handle inbound calls & texts from U.S. clients

- Gather key information (using a script)

- Schedule consultations on our specialists’ calendars

title: Lead Full-Stack Engineer (AI-Native) — Property Management / Coliving Platform
description:
Summary



We’re building a web-first, bed-native Property Management System (PMS) that unifies coliving (bed-level), short-term rentals (nightly), and long-term rentals (leases) into one operational platform with auditable financial records. We use AI tools (Codex, etc.) to generate code fast — your job is to own architecture and delivery, review AI output, keep quality high, and ship weekly.



What you’ll own



End-to-end delivery of the core platform (Next.js admin + Postgres/Supabase backend)



Repo quality: migrations, CI, tests, PR discipline, release readiness



Deployment: preview environments + production pipeline (Vercel/Netlify + Supabase)



Must-have skills



Strong Next.js/React + TypeScript (App Router preferred)



Strong Postgres fundamentals: schema design, migrations, constraints



Multi-tenant SaaS patterns: org scoping, RBAC/RLS concepts, audit trails



Practical payments knowledge: invoices, allocations, refunds/voids, webhook reliability (Stripe a plus)



GitHub workflow mastery: PRs, code review, branching, releases



“AI-native” workflow: prompt ? diff ? refactor ? tests ? ship (not blind copy/paste)



How we work



Fast iterations: small PRs, preview deployments, weekly demos



Minimal meetings; heavy async updates in GitHub



You will use AI tools daily, but quality and correctness come first

title: Construction Accountant / Financial Controller (ServiceTitan) – Remote
description:
Construction Accountant / Financial Controller (ServiceTitan) – Remote



Company: Coharbor Electric

Location: Remote – Must Work U.S. Eastern Time Zone Hours

Job Type: Contract or Part-Time (Potential for Long-Term Role)



About CoHarbor Electric



CoHarbor Electric is a growing electrical contracting company serving Southwest Florida with both service and construction projects. With approximately 20 employees and continued growth, we are focused on strengthening our financial systems, improving operational visibility, and building scalable processes.



Our team includes U.S.-based staff and three remote tea
mbers in the Philippines, and we are looking for an experienced construction accountant / financial operations professional to help us improve financial accuracy, job costing, and operational insight.



This role is fully remote, but the candidate must be available to work during U.S. Eastern Time Zone hours.



POSITION OVERVIEW

* We are seeking an experienced Construction Accountant or Financial Controller with strong knowledge of ServiceTitan, QuickBooks, and job costing within the trades industry.



* This role will focus on financial visibility, job cost accuracy, root-cause analysis of financial issues, and improving financial workflows across the business.



*The right candidate will not only maintain accurate books but will also identify operational issues that impact profitability and provide actionable insights to leadership.



INITIAL PRIORITIES



 *The first phase of this position will focus on cleaning up and improving financial systems:



 *Investigate and resolve $0 invoices within ServiceTitan, identifying root causes and correcting workflow issues



 *Set up and organize Accounts Payable and vendor management inside ServiceTitan



 *Ensure vendors, purchase orders, and job costs are properly connected to projects



 *Clean up employee records and classifications in QuickBooks



 *Review and improve ServiceTitan and QuickBooks integration workflows



 *Implement processes that allow leadership to understand where the business stands financially on a weekly basis



RESPONSIBILITIES

*Manage accounting operations including accounts payable, vendor management, and financial reporting



*Maintain accurate records in QuickBooks



* Run payroll



*Work within ServiceTitan to review invoices, job costing, financial transactions, and operational workflows



*Monitor job costing and project profitability across service and construction work



*Investigate financial irregularities such as $0 invoices, incorrect job costing, or missing billing



*Identify root causes of financial or operational breakdowns and recommend corrective actions



*Provide clear financial insight and reporting to leadership



*Prepare monthly financial statements and management reports



*Conduct financial analysis and forecasting to support strategic decisions



*Monitor cash flow and spending categories



*Provide alerts regarding unusual spending or operational inefficiencies



*Ensure compliance with accounting standards and internal controls



*Help improve and maintain financial systems and workflows



*Collaborate with internal staff and remote tea
mbers to ensure accurate financial data



*Assist in building processes that support scaling operations



QUALIFICATIONS



*Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance



*3+ years experience in construction or trades accounting



*MUST HAVE Strong experience with ServiceTitan



*MUST HAVE Proficiency with QuickBooks



*Experience with job costing and contractor financial workflows



*Knowledge of GAAP accounting principles



*Experience managing accounts payable and vendor systems



*Strong analytical and problem-solving skills



*Ability to identify financial trends and operational inefficiencies



*Comfortable working independently in a remote environment



*Strong communication skills for presenting insights to leadership



*Experience with electrical, HVAC, plumbing, or service contractors



*CPA certification or advanced accounting degree



WORK ENVIRONMENT- Fully remote. Must be available during U.S. Eastern Time Zone business hours. Work alongside a distributed team including U.S. staff and tea
mbers in the Philippines



COMPENSATION

Compensation depends on experience and level of responsibility.





Screening Questions (Required)



1. ServiceTitan Experience

How many years of hands-on experience do you have using ServiceTitan? Please describe the accounting or financial tasks you performed inside the platform.



2. Construction / Trades Experience

Describe your experience working with service or construction companies (electrical, HVAC, plumbing, etc.). What financial responsibilities did you manage?



3. Job Costing Experience

How have you used job costing to identify profitability issues or financial discrepancies in a construction or service business?



4. $0 Invoice Investigation

If you noticed a pattern of $0 invoices appearing in ServiceTitan, how would you investigate the root cause?



5. Time Zone Availability

This role requires working during U.S. Eastern Time Zone business hours. Are you available during those hours?

title: Client Engagement & Renewal Assistant
description:
We are hiring a Client Engagement & Renewal Specialist to make outbound calls to existing clients and prepare them for their upcoming health insurance renewal. This role focuses on verifying client information, explaining the renewal process, and ensuring clients are ready to speak with a licensed insurance agent.

This position requires clear, fluent English and strong phone communication skills. Candidates must be professional, confident, and able to speak naturally while following a structured script.

Key Responsibilities

Place outbound renewal preparation calls to existing clients

Clearly explain the reason for the call and next steps in the renewal process

Verify and document client information accurately

Maintain professional and compliant communication

Enter call notes and updates into the agency system

Required Qualifications

Clear, fluent English is required (spoken and written)

Strong phone presence and communication skills

Ability to follow a script while sounding natural

Reliable, detail-oriented, and professional

Comfortable speaking with clients by phone

Preferred Qualifications

Customer service, call center, or insurance experience

Experience with outbound calling or follow-ups

Familiarity with CRM or data-entry systems

Interview Requirement (Mandatory)

All applicants must submit a short recorded call role-play using the script below. This recording is required to move forward in the hiring process.

The recording will be evaluated for:

English clarity and pronunciation

Professional tone and confidence

Ability to follow instructions and script flow

Interview Call Script

Candidates must read this script clearly and naturally in their recording.

“Hello, may I speak with [Client First Name], please?

Hi [Client Name], my name is [Your Name], and I’m calling from [Agency Name]. I’m calling on behalf of your insurance agent regarding your upcoming health insurance renewal.

The reason for my call today is to make sure we have the correct information on file so your renewal can be reviewed properly and without delays. This helps prevent unexpected premium increases or coverage changes.

Do you have a couple of minutes so I can verify a few details with you?

Thank you. I’ll confirm your household size, estimated income for the upcoming year, and the best phone number and
 to reach you.

Once this is complete, your licensed agent will review your options and follow up with you if needed.

Thank you for your time today. We appreciate the opportunity to continue assisting you with your health insurance coverage.”

How to Apply

Submit your application along with your recorded call role-play using the script above. Applications without the recording will not be considered.

title: Executive Assistant and Operations - Real Estate Team
description:
BOLTON & CLEMENTS REAL ESTATE GROUP

Virtual Assistant — Real Estate Operations

Remote (Philippines-Based)  |  Full-Time  |  Compensation: Negotiable Based on Experience



About Us

Bolton & Clements Real Estate Group is a high-performance real estate team based in the Greater Toronto Area, Canada.

We run a fast-moving operation with high standards, clear systems, and a results-first culture.

We are growing and we want the right people growing with us — long term.



The Role

We are looking for a sharp, self-directed Virtual Assistant to support our real estate operations remotely from the Philippines. This is not a passive, task-waiting role. We need someone who is proactive, takes ownership, communicates clearly in professional English, and has a genuine drive to keep things running at a high level. If you spot a problem, we expect you to bring a solution. If a system is broken, we expect you to say so. This is a long-term position with real growth for the right person.



Language Requirement

High-level English proficiency is non-negotiable.

Written and verbal English must be professional, precise, and client-ready at all times.

You will be drafting client communications, social content, and internal reports on behalf of the team.

Grammar, tone, and clarity are taken seriously — this is a reflection of our brand.



Core Responsibilities

CRM & Database Management

Maintain CRM integrity and execute lead follow-up workflows in Follow Up Boss

Keep all contact records, pipelines, and tags accurate and up to date

Manage databases for contests, giveaways, and client events



Transaction & Listing Support

Support listing workflow from signed agreement through to sold

Assist with Skyslope transaction management and compliance documentation

Prepare and update internal production reports and KPI tracking

Coordinate with vendors and other tea
mbers to keep timelines on track



Marketing & Creative

Create social media posts and manage content scheduling

Design print materials and social graphics in Canva (feature sheets, flyers, digital ads)

Manage online promotions, giveaways, and contests — from creative through registration to database management

Light video editing and posting across platforms (Reels, YouTube Shorts, etc.)

Optimize social profiles and content for AI and SEO visibility



Operations & Administration

Support executive calendar and task management

Prepare CMAs, presentations, and internal reporting as directed

Identify gaps in processes and proactively recommend improvements

Assist in coordinating client events and managing logistics remotely

Hold systems accountable — follow up, flag issues, and close loops without being asked



What You Bring

2+ years of experience in real estate administration, VA work, or executive/operations support

Proficient in Follow Up Boss, Skyslope, and Canva — or demonstrably fast to learn new tools

Strong design instincts for both print materials and social media content

Comfortable with light video editing and publishing on major platforms

Working knowledge of AI tools and SEO best practices

Self-starter — you take initiative and do not wait to be told what to do

You spot broken processes and suggest fixes, not just flag problems

An undying need for systems to run properly — this is not a casual attitude for you

High attention to detail and disciplined follow-through on every task

Professional, polished written English — always

Reliable internet connection and a distraction-free remote work setup



What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days)

CRM is clean, current, and operating without prompting

Listings and transactions are moving with fewer errors and zero dropped follow-ups

Marketing content is live, on-brand, and consistent

At least one process gap identified, proposed, and resolved

Weekly reports and KPIs are delivered accurately and on time

The leadership team trusts you to own your scope without micromanagement



What We Offer

Fully remote, long-term position with a stable and growing Canadian real estate team

Competitive compensation negotiable based on experience and skill level

A team that values operators, rewards ownership, and promotes from within

Clear expectations, direct communication, and no unnecessary politics

Real opportunity to grow your role as the company scales

title: Web Developer/Seo

title: Senior Video Editor
description:
We're a growing marketing and production agency specializing in contractor and real estate businesses. Video is at the core of what we do — it's how our clients generate leads, build trust, and grow their businesses. We already have a strong lead editor in place, and now we're looking for a talented Senior Video Editor to join the team, hit the ground running, and grow alongside us.



This is a fully remote, long-term position for someone who is already highly skilled and is looking for a stable real work, measurable impact. 



What You'll Be Editing

• Job Site & Contractor Footage: Raw on-site footage from roofing, remodeling, landscaping, and construction projects — turned into cinematic, engaging content.

• Before & After Transformations: One of the most powerful formats in our niche. You'll know how to build tension, reveal, and land the payoff.

• Talking Head & Interview Footage: Contractor and client testimonials that need to feel authentic, clean, and compelling — not stiff or corporate.

• Social Media Reels & Shorts: Fast-paced, hook-driven edits optimized for Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube Shorts.

• Real Estate Videos: Property walkthroughs and listings that need to feel premium — smooth pacing, clean color, and strong visual flow.



Your Responsibilities

• Edit a consistent volume of contractor, real estate, and social content to a high standard — on deadline, every time.

• Execute precise speed ramps, motion effects, and transitions that match the energy of the content.

• Apply clean, consistent color grades that make job site footage look polished and professional.

• Design and implement text overlays, lower thirds, and CTA graphics that drive real engagement.

• Deliver professional sound design — music sync, audio cleanup, whooshes, and atmospheric sound.

• Collaborate with our lead editor and take feedback without ego — we're all here to make the work better.

• Manage your own workflow and communicate proactively about turnaround times.



What We Offer

We take care of the people who show up and deliver.

Flexible working arrangement.

Long-term stability — we're not looking for a freelancer, we're looking for a tea
mber.

Learn from a strong lead editor already producing high-performing content.

Paid course sponsorship for the right individual — if you're hungry to level up your craft, we'll invest in that.

A niche where great editing directly drives leads and business growth — your work has real stakes.





Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

3+ Years of professional video editing experience — this is a senior role, not a stepping stone.

A portfolio that includes contractor, construction, real estate, or similar content. We need to see you know this world.

Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro.

Strong understanding of speed ramps, motion effects, pacing, color grading, and sound design — not as tricks, but as storytelling tools.

Deep familiarity with editing gimbal footage, various frame rates, and focal lengths.

Reliability — you hit deadlines, communicate clearly, and don't disappear.



What We'll Look For in Your Reel

Before we read a single word of your application, we're going to watch your work. Here's what we're looking for:

Speed Ramps — Do you use them naturally, or do they feel forced? This tells us if you understand energy and 
ntum.

Color Consistency — Does your grade hold up across different lighting conditions? This tells us if your work is ready for real clients.

Text & Graphics — Are your overlays clean and purposeful? This tells us if you have the designer's eye our content requires.



Who You Are

You're a self-starter — you don't need someone checking in on you to produce great work.

You take pride in every frame, not just the final export.

You're coachable — you can receive direction from a lead editor and use it to make the work better.

You're looking for a long-term home, not a short gig.

You understand that in this niche, great editing = more leads = real business impact.



Examples of the Work We're Looking For

Before you apply, watch these. This is the style, energy, and quality level we produce. If your work matches or exceeds this, we want to hear from you.

Example 1: 

Example 2: 

Example 3: 



How to Apply

To be considered, include all of the following:

A link to your current reel or portfolio (YouTube or Vimeo preferred).

At least one example of contractor, construction, or real estate content you edited.

A brief note covering: which software you use, how long you've been editing professionally, and what type of content you're most experienced in.

Your expected monthly rate (USD).

  ??  Applications without a portfolio link will not be reviewed.



We look forward to seeing your work. Let's build something great together.

title: Legal Assistant for Criminal Defense Lawyer in Florida
description:
I am a fast-moving, trial-focused criminal defense attorney. My strengths lie in high-level strategy, aggressive litigation, and client acquisition.



I am seeking my opposite: someone who derives genuine satisfaction from creating order out of chaos, building rigid systems, and catching the small errors that I will inevitably miss. If you need a predictable, slow-paced corporate environment, do not apply. If you thrive on being the structural backbone of a fast-growing business, keep reading.



We Require:



* Ruthless Anticipation & Low-Friction Planning

    * Example: You don't just schedule a deposition. You recognize that the event requires me to drive. Unprompted, you calculate the drive time, block it off on my calendar so nothing else gets scheduled, and include the exact parking instructions in the invite.



To prove you have the extreme attention to detail required for this role, do not start your proposal with a standard greeting. The very first line of your cover letter must be exactly this: Executive VA - [Your Favorite Color] - [Your Typing Speed WPM].



Disqualifiers (Do NOT apply if):

* You require constant follow-up to ensure a task was completed.

* You take direct feedback personally.

* You rely on me to remember deadlines or administrative protocols.

title: Property & Construction Accounting Analyst
description:
Property & Construction Accounting Analyst



Upside Capital Holdings



Rate: $10-$13/hour



Schedule: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST



Work Setup: Fully Remote



About the Role



The Property & Construction Accounting Analyst will support the accounting needs of Upside Capital Holdings across our residential construction projects and multifamily real estate portfolio. This role includes budget assistance, payroll allocation, intercompany reconciliations, bank reconciliations, and general accounting functions for various US-based entities.



Key Responsibilities



Perform daily accounting tasks, journal entries, and month-end close support.

Assist with budget preparation, forecasting, variance tracking, and CapEx cost monitoring.

Manage payroll allocations, distribution logs, and employee record updates.

Prepare and maintain intercompany reconciliation schedules across multiple entities.

Complete monthly bank reconciliations and review cash activity.

Support AP/AR processing, vendor documentation, and invoice management.

Maintain organized digital financial files and provide support for audits or CPA requests.

Prepare reports, spreadsheets, trackers, and financial summaries as needed.



Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance (CPA preferred).

1–3 years of accounting experience handling US-based clients.

Experience in residential construction and/or multifamily real estate accounting is strongly preferred.

QuickBooks Online experience is required.

Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook).

Experience with ResMan or AppFolio is a plus.

Strong attention to detail, accuracy, and organization.

Ability to work independently in a fully remote environment.

title: SEO Manager
description:
Job Title: SEO Manager (Ecommerce)



Location: Remote / Hybrid (depending on agency setup)

Department: Marketing

Reports To: Head of Marketing / Agency Director



Job Overview



We are seeking a results-driven SEO Manager to lead and execute search engine optimization strategies for multiple ecommerce clients. This role will be responsible for managing 5+ ecommerce stores independently, ensuring strong organic growth, improved search visibility, and measurable revenue impact.



The ideal candidate has deep experience in technical SEO, on-page optimization, keyword strategy, and ecommerce SEO, and is comfortable owning SEO strategy from planning to execution.



Key Responsibilities

SEO Strategy & Planning



Develop and implement comprehensive SEO strategies for 5+ ecommerce stores simultaneously.



Conduct keyword research and competitive analysis to identify growth opportunities.



Build and maintain SEO roadmaps aligned with business goals and client KPIs.



Monitor search trends and algorithm updates to adjust strategies accordingly.



On-Page SEO



Optimize product pages, category pages, and collections for improved rankings.



Implement best practices for meta tags, headers, internal linking, and structured data.



Work with content teams to create SEO-optimized product descriptions, blog content, and landing pages.



Improve site architecture and crawlability.



Technical SEO



Conduct regular technical audits to identify and resolve issues affecting site performance.



Manage SEO factors such as:



Site speed



Mobile optimization



Indexing issues



Canonicalization



Schema markup



Core Web Vitals



Collaborate with developers to implement technical improvements.



Ecommerce SEO



Optimize product listings, category pages, and filters for organic search.



Manage SEO strategies for large product catalogs.



Improve conversion-focused search traffic.



Analytics & Reporting



Track and analyze SEO performance using tools like:



Google Analytics



Google Search Console



Ahrefs / SEMrush



Provide monthly SEO performance reports including rankings, traffic growth, and revenue impact.



Identify areas for optimization and continuous improvement.



Link Building & Authority Growth



Develop and execute ethical link-building strategies.



Identify backlink opportunities and partnerships.



Monitor backlink profiles and address toxic links.



Client & Project Management



Manage multiple ecommerce SEO projects simultaneously.



Communicate strategy, progress, and results clearly to internal teams or clients.



Prioritize tasks and maintain project timelines.



Requirements

Experience



3–5+ years of SEO experience, preferably within an agency environment.



Proven experience managing multiple ecommerce websites.



Demonstrated success in growing organic traffic and revenue.



Technical Skills



Strong understanding of:



Technical SEO



On-page optimization



Ecommerce SEO structures



Experience with SEO tools such as:



Ahrefs / SEMrush



Screaming Frog



Google Analytics



Google Search Console



Familiarity with Shopify, WooCommerce, or other ecommerce platforms.



Soft Skills



Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.



Excellent organizational and project management skills.



Ability to manage 5+ SEO accounts independently.



Strong communication and reporting skills.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



Growth in organic traffic



Improvement in keyword rankings



Increase in organic revenue



Technical SEO health score improvements



Successful management of multiple ecommerce clients



Bonus Skills



Experience with international SEO



Familiarity with conversion rate optimization (CRO)



Knowledge of content marketing and digital PR



Basic understanding of HTML/CSS



What Success Looks Like in This Role



Each ecommerce store shows consistent growth in organic traffic and sales.



SEO initiatives are executed proactively without constant oversight.



Technical SEO issues are identified and resolved before impacting performance.



Clients clearly understand the ROI and value of SEO efforts.

title: ADMISSIONS AND  STUDENT SERVICES COORDINATOR
description:
JOB POST FOR THE ADMISSIONS AND 

STUDENT SERVICES COORDINATOR





At Heritage Career Institute, we are dedicated to advancing healthcare education and preparing the next generation of nursing professionals. Our commitment to academic excellence, innovative teaching methods, and hands-on learning experiences sets the foundation for our students to excel in their nursing careers. 



We are looking for a dedicated and highly organized ADMISSIONS & STUDENT SERVICES COORDINATOR to join our team. This role plays a vital part in guiding prospective students through their academic journey—from inquiry to enrollment—and providing ongoing support throughout their stay in the institution. 



This is a part-time position that requires up to 10 hours per week, depending on the management approval. Your permanent Shift will be during the OPENING OPERATIONS (AM) Eastern Standard Time, specifically 9:30AM to 1:00PM EST.



Position Summary:



Position:  Admissions & Student Services Coordinator

Initial Employment Status: Probationary, Part-Time

Reporting To: School Director

Start Date: 1 week after signing the Offer Letter

Work Schedule: Opening Operations (AM): 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM Eastern Standard Time (EST) 

Rendering Hours: up to 10 hours per week (depending on the management approval)

Compensation (Monthly): 3, 400pesos (if still 85 pesos per hour)



Responsibilities of Admissions & Student Services Coordinator

The Admissions Office at Heritage Career Institute, plays an important role in the recruitment of potential enrollees to the Institution’s healthcare programs. The Admissions & Student Services Coordinator will be the primary contact for applicants, providing the necessary information about their inquiries, and assisting them with the application and enrollment process.



This Job Description will be outlined in detail for you to further understand your role.

ADMISSIONS & STUDENT SERVICES COORDINATOR

Reports to: School Director 

Collaborates with: Registrar, Clinical Coordinator, Finance Coordinator, Marketing & Communications Coordinator 

Primary Focus: Full student-journey management (inquiry ? graduate ? alumni) plus catalog and front-end compliance







Key Responsibilities:



Recruitment & Enrollment:

Respond to inquiries, conduct tours, and manage online application files

Coordinate open houses and information sessions with Marketing Team

Verify admission documentation (high school diploma, transcripts, test scores)

Prepare enrollment agreements and coordinate with Finance for tuition setup

Manage lead tracking and CRM system



Student Support:

Organize orientation and track attendance/satisfaction

Coordinate tutoring or academic advising referrals

Maintain student communication (announcements, policy updates)

Handle student complaints and grievances (initial contact)



Accreditation / Compliance Duties:

Maintain and annually update school catalog (dates, tuition, policies, disclosures)

Archive marketing materials and advertising samples for CIE review

Ensure admissions and enrollment forms match approved templates

Track placement data, competitor school’s tuition information, and surveys for annual reporting (employment rates, salary data)

Maintain evidence online folder for recruitment, orientation, and placement outcomes

Ensure all marketing claims are accurate and substantiated



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Communication, Education, Psychology, Business Administration, or a related field.

Has background experience in Admissions, Student services, or Customer service is required. 

Strong communication, interpersonal, and customer-service skills in making calls.

Has keen attention to detail in reviewing and verifying documents to ensure accuracy 

Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and general administrative tools. 

Ability to work with minimal supervision and maintain confidentiality.

Ability to work during AM EST hours without any conflicting schedule 

Must NOT engage in any other employment, consulting, or business activity (whether full-time or part-time) that may create a conflict of interest with the Institution. 

Knowledge about 
 or Click-up Application is a plus!



Requirements:

Submit a copy of your resume to 
 make sure that you have read the Position Summary. 

No counter offers will be accepted.

Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted for an interview.



You are required to fill out this application form:

title: Creative Marketing VA for High-Energy Austin Real Estate Brand
description:
This is a creative marketing role with real substance behind it.

You'll be the voice and visual engine behind a top Austin real estate brand — helping a 23-year veteran REALTOR® show up consistently, beautifully, and strategically across every platform.



If you love content, care about details, and want to grow inside a brand that actually has something to say — this is your seat.

This is NOT a "post pretty pictures" job. We build campaigns, funnels, and databases. But we also believe great marketing feels like something. That's where you come in.



What You'll Do

Property Marketing



Create listing flyers and marketing materials in Canva (Adobe a plus)

Transform MLS descriptions into polished, on-brand marketing copy

Build single-property websites from existing templates

Resize and format images for multiple platforms

Keep listing status current across all platforms



Social Media & Content



Repurpose long-form content into punchy short-form posts

Schedule content in Meta Business Suite

Pull and format video clips for Reels-style content

Design thumbnails and graphic assets that stop the scroll



 Marketing



Build and format campaigns in Mailchimp

Segment and upload contact lists

Test
s before sending

Track and report on open rates and basic metrics



Lead Generation & Admin



Research neighborhoods and compile market data

Download and format databases and mailing lists

Run mail merge campaigns

Upload and tag leads in CRM

Schedule appointments and manage calendar



AI & Automation Support



Use AI tools to draft content — then make it sound human

Help document SOPs and workflow steps as we build them together



Who You Are

You're a natural communicator who also happens to be organized and reliable. You have an eye for design, a feel for tone, and you don't need someone standing over your shoulder to produce great work.



You care about getting it right — but you also bring personality to everything you touch.



Strong written English — warm, clear, and professional

Canva proficiency required — Adobe is a major plus

Google Workspace comfortable (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

Mailchimp experience preferred

You use AI tools AND know when to overrule them

Reliable internet, available for partial U.S. Central Time overlap



Work Details



20–30 hours/week to start, with real growth potential

Pay based on experience

Daily end-of-day summary required (completed / pending / questions)

Weekly priorities provided by the team



HOW TO APPLY — Read This Carefully! Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



1. Basic Info



Hourly rate request (USD)

Hours available in U.S. Central Time

Hours per week you're seeking



2. Writing Test — Do This First

A first-time home seller asks you: "What should I post on social media to help sell my home?"



Answer in your own words. Under 100 words. No AI.

This is where we see you — your voice, your instincts, your style. We've reviewed enough AI-generated responses to spot them immediately. Don't do it.



3. Practical Task

Create a bullet-point checklist titled: "New Listing Marketing Launch."



Don't overthink it — just show us how your brain works. We want to see your instincts, not a textbook answer. Bonus points if it reflects real creativity, not just a generic checklist.



List the steps you'd take to get a new listing out into the world. There are no wrong answers — we want to see how you think and how you organize. Again, write it yourself. AI submissions are removed without response.



BONUS points if you create a social media ad!



4. Software Experience

Brief description of your experience with:



Canva

Adobe Illustrator or Photoshop (if applicable)

Mailchimp

AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

Others that you feel are important for the job



5. One More Thing

Record a 60–90 second Loom video. Introduce yourself and tell us: what do you love about social media marketing?



We want to hear your voice and see your energy before we ever get on a call.

title: AI Video Producer
description:
Are you someone who THRIVES on AMBITION, OWNERSHIP, and CREATIVE STRATEGY?



Do you get excited by the idea of producing thumb-stopping e-commerce video ads using the latest AI tools—while still keeping the output human, emotional, and conversion-driven?



If you’re nodding with a big “ABSOLUTELY!”, keep reading. This might be the opportunity you’ve been waiting for.



We’re a young and ambitious e-commerce brand on a mission to improve the lives of women over 60 through thoughtful, high-quality products designed specifically for them.



We’re searching for an AI Video Producer to help us scale winning creatives—fast.



Your role? A blend of creative strategy + hands-on production, using AI to generate VO and clips for high-performing direct-response ads for Meta (and beyond).



You’ll play a critical role in shaping the visual voice of our brand, ensuring every video doesn’t just look good… it sells.



We’re aiming to build an 8-figure brand within the next 12 months, and we need a growth-minded A-player who thrives at the intersection of creativity, speed, and performance.



What We’re Looking For



We’re not just hiring for skills—we’re building a team based on shared values:



Unvarnished Integrity: Truth builds trust.

Urgent Precision: Speed matters, but quality wins.

Challenge Assumptions: We test, iterate, improve.

Relentless Improvement: Complacency is the enemy.

Extreme Ownership: You own outcomes, not tasks.



What You’ll Be Doing



AI-Powered Creative Production

Generate high-volume creative iterations (hooks, clips, ugc) using AI

Produce UGC-style ads, direct-response video ads, and VSL assets that are emotionally compelling and conversion-focused.

Turn briefs into ready-to-edit packages



Systems & Output



Maintain clean naming, versioning, and a scalable workflow so production stays fast as volume increases.

Build reusable templates and frameworks for consistent creative output.



What You’ll Need to Bring



Proven experience producing video content (Meta experience strongly preferred).

Strong understanding of hooks, retention, pacing, and conversion psychology.





Confidence using AI tools for:



VO generation / audio cleanup

Video / Images

Ability to create content that feels human, authentic, and emotionally resonant (not “AI polished”).

Strong taste: you know what’s cringe, what’s scroll-stopping, and what will fatigue.

Ability to manage multiple projects and hit deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

Excellent communication, self-management, and a builder mindset.



What’s In It For You



Above-market compensation, plus performance-based bonuses (depending on experience).

The chance to be a creative operator in a fast-growing brand—your work will shape campaigns seen worldwide.

A high-growth path: as we scale, you can grow.



To apply, submit your application here:

Do you get excited by the idea of producing thumb-stopping e-commerce video ads using the latest AI tools—while still keeping the output human, emotional, and conversion-driven?



If you’re nodding with a big “ABSOLUTELY!”, keep reading. This might be the opportunity you’ve been waiting for.



We’re a young and ambitious e-commerce brand on a mission to improve the lives of women over 60 through thoughtful, high-quality products designed specifically for them.



We’re searching for an AI Video Producer to help us scale winning creatives—fast.



Your role? A blend of creative strategy + hands-on production, using AI to generate VO and clips for high-performing direct-response ads for Meta (and beyond).



You’ll play a critical role in shaping the visual voice of our brand, ensuring every video doesn’t just look good… it sells.



We’re aiming to build an 8-figure brand within the next 12 months, and we need a growth-minded A-player who thrives at the intersection of creativity, speed, and performance.



What We’re Looking For



We’re not just hiring for skills—we’re building a team based on shared values:



Unvarnished Integrity: Truth builds trust.

Urgent Precision: Speed matters, but quality wins.

Challenge Assumptions: We test, iterate, improve.

Relentless Improvement: Complacency is the enemy.

Extreme Ownership: You own outcomes, not tasks.



What You’ll Be Doing



AI-Powered Creative Production

Generate high-volume creative iterations (hooks, clips, ugc) using AI

Produce UGC-style ads, direct-response video ads, and VSL assets that are emotionally compelling and conversion-focused.

Turn briefs into ready-to-edit packages



Systems & Output



Maintain clean naming, versioning, and a scalable workflow so production stays fast as volume increases.

Build reusable templates and frameworks for consistent creative output.



What You’ll Need to Bring



Proven experience producing video content (Meta experience strongly preferred).

Strong understanding of hooks, retention, pacing, and conversion psychology.





Confidence using AI tools for:



VO generation / audio cleanup

Video / Images

Ability to create content that feels human, authentic, and emotionally resonant (not “AI polished”).

Strong taste: you know what’s cringe, what’s scroll-stopping, and what will fatigue.

Ability to manage multiple projects and hit deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

Excellent communication, self-management, and a builder mindset.



What’s In It For You



Above-market compensation, plus performance-based bonuses (depending on experience).

The chance to be a creative operator in a fast-growing brand—your work will shape campaigns seen worldwide.

A high-growth path: as we scale, you can grow.



To apply, submit your application here:

title: US Sales Development Representative (SDR) – $1,200–$1,800 USD + Bonuses | Long-Term Remote
description:
USD base salary + bonuses. Long-term remote role with a U.S. executive search firm.

Speak directly with company owners and executives while creating real business opportunities.

Strong performers grow quickly and increase their income.



We are hiring a Sales Development Representative (SDR) to help generate new client relationships for our U.S. executive search firm specializing in construction and infrastructure leadership placements.



This role is not typical appointment setting. You will engage directly with business owners and senior executives, build real conversations, and create opportunities that turn into signed partnerships.



Top performers in this role often grow into Executive Recruiter positions.



***What You’ll Do***

• Identify and research decision-makers at U.S. companies

• Run outbound campaigns via phone, LinkedIn, and

• Start conversations with executives and business leaders

• Set qualified meetings that convert into real opportunities

• Handle objections professionally and confidently

• Collaborate with the U.S. recruiting team to convert meetings into new business

• Consistently hit activity and performance targets



This is a high-energy, results-driven environment where activity and performance matter.



***Who Thrives In This Role***

• 1+ year outbound sales, SDR, appointment setting, or cold-calling experience

• Strong English communication skills with confident phone presence

• Competitive mindset and strong internal drive

• Excellent listening and objection-handling ability

• Organized, disciplined, and comfortable working toward KPIs

• Comfortable speaking with executives and decision-makers



If you enjoy winning conversations and creating opportunities, you will do well here.



***What We Offer***

• USD base salary ($1,200–$1,800/month)

• Performance bonuses tied to results

• Long-term full-time employment (not freelance or project-based)

• Structured onboarding and training

• Mentorship from experienced U.S. recruiters

• Growth path into Executive Recruiter roles



Strong performers often double their income over time.



***How To Apply***



Submit your resume 



Include a 1–2 minute voice or video recording answering:

• Your outbound sales or SDR experience

• Your proudest measurable sales achievement

• Why you believe you would succeed in this role



Applications with recordings will receive priority review.



Quick question for applicants:



In 3–4 sentences, how would you introduce our recruiting firm to a U.S. company president on a cold call?

title: #Paid Ads Specialist (Preferably With Experience on Reddit Ads) | Top Pay + Bonuses + Elite Benefits**
description:
Job Overview

We are looking for a Paid Ads Specialist to plan, manage, and optimize paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms, with strong experience in Reddit Ads. The ideal candidate also has hands-on experience with Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads and understands performance marketing, conversion tracking, and ROI optimization.



This role requires someone who is data-driven, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple campaigns while continuously improving performance.



Key Responsibilities

- Plan, launch, and manage paid advertising campaigns, with a strong focus on Reddit Ads

- Manage campaigns on Google Ads, Meta Ads 
 and Instagram), and LinkedIn Ads

- Conduct audience research, keyword research, and competitor analysis

- Write ad copy and collaborate with designers for effective ad creatives

- Set up and manage tracking using Google Tag Manager, GA4, Meta Pixel, and LinkedIn Insight Tag

- Monitor and optimize campaigns for CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, and conversion rate

- Perform A/B testing on ad creatives, headlines, CTAs, and landing pages

- Manage and optimize ad budgets to maximize ROI

- Prepare weekly and monthly campaign performance reports

- Identify opportunities to scale campaigns and improve results



Required Qualifications

- Proven experience running and optimizing Reddit Ads campaigns

- Experience with Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads

- Strong understanding of performance marketing and conversion tracking

- Experience with Google Analytics (GA4) and Google Tag Manager

- Strong analytical and reporting skills

- Highly organized and detail-oriented



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

- Computer: Intel i5 processor (or better) with at least 8GB RAM

- Equipment: Webcam, microphone, and headset or speakers

- Internet: Minimum 100 Mbps stable connection with a backup internet source



WORK SCHEDULE & LOCATION

- Schedule: Tuesday–Saturday, 12:00 AM–8:30 AM Manila Time

- Location: Remote—open to candidates based in the Philippines



WHY WORK WITH US?

- Long-term and stable position

- Competitive pay with bi-monthly payouts

- Comprehensive benefits, bonuses, and annual salary reviews

- Work-from-home setup promoting work-life balance

- Supportive remote work environment using Google Meet and time-tracking tools

- Collaborative team culture with strong growth opportunities



Ready to Apply?

- Send your resume to 
 or 



Virtual Office Setup:

We ask tea
mbers to maintain a virtual presence via Google Meet during designated check-ins to ensure communication, collaboration, and accountability. The company uses a time tracker to monitor productivity during project hours.



Direct Hire:

This is a direct hire position—you will be employed and managed directly by our company, not through an agency or third party.





**Important Note: Do not send your application via our social media platforms or website contact forms. Failure to follow this instruction may result in disqualification.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller- Conversation Style + Deal Bonuses
description:
About Us



Brooks Empire, LLC is a fast-paced real estate acquisitions company focused on connecting with property owners and creating win-win offers. We move quickly, expect strong performance, and reward results.



Role Overview



We are hiring a confident, results-driven cold caller who can speak naturally with U.S. property owners using a conversational (not scripted or robotic) approach. Your goal is to identify motivated sellers and generate qualified leads for our acquisitions team.



Responsibilities



Make 250–400 outbound calls per shift



Speak with property owners and build quick rapport



Handle objections professionally



Identify motivation and qualify leads



Accurately record call notes and dispositions



Submit daily performance report



Compensation $4-$7 or avail



Performance-based pay



$5 per qualified lead



$100 per closed deal



High performers can earn significantly more.



Required Skills



Clear, confident speaking voice



Strong objection-handling ability



Ability to control conversations naturally



Reliable internet and headset



Prior cold calling or sales experience preferred



Interview Scoring System



Applicants will be evaluated live and scored (1–5) in each category:



Confidence



Conversation Control



Objection Handling



Energy Level



Clarity of Speech



Sales Instinct



Minimum hire score: 22/30



Trial Requirement



Final candidates must complete a short trial:



Call provided leads



Submit call recordings + notes



Show contact and lead results



How to Apply



Send:



Resume or experience summary



Voice recording saying:“Hi, I’m calling about your property. Would you consider an offer if it made sense?”



Screenshot of past dialing stats (if available)



Applications without voice samples will not be reviewed.



We hire fast, reward performance, and keep top producers long-term.

title: Bookkeeper
description:
Job Title: Outsourced Bookkeeper – Construction Company (Remote)



Company: R&B Framing Inc.

Location: Remote / Outsourced



Job Overview



R&B Framing Inc., a construction company based in California, is seeking a reliable and experienced outsourced bookkeeper to manage our day-to-day financial records and maintain accurate accounting for our projects. The ideal candidate has experience working with construction companies and understands job costing, project tracking, and contractor accounting workflows.



This is a remote / outsourced position with flexible hours but consistent weekly responsibilities.



Key Responsibilities



Record and categorize all financial transactions



Reconcile bank and credit card accounts monthly



Track project expenses and assist with job costing



Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable tracking



Review invoices and verify expenses against project budgets



Prepare monthly financial reports (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)



Monitor outstanding invoices and assist with collections tracking



Maintain organized financial records for tax preparation



Coordinate with company management regarding financial status



Ensure books remain accurate and up-to-date at all times



Preferred Experience



3+ years of bookkeeping experience



Experience working with construction companies



Strong understanding of job costing and project accounting



Experience with accounting software (QuickBooks, Buildertrend, or similar)



Ability to manage multiple projects and expenses accurately



Strong attention to detail and organization



Skills Required



Accounts payable / receivable



Bank reconciliation



Financial reporting



Job costing



Construction accounting



Spreadsheet proficiency (Excel or Google Sheets)



Work Arrangement



Remote / Outsourced



Part-time (hours based on workload)



Long-term collaboration preferred



How to Apply



Please submit:



Resume or summary of bookkeeping experience



Experience working with construction companies



Software you are familiar with



Your hourly rate or monthly service fee

title: Customer success rep
description:
Job Overview

We are looking for a highly detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to process customer support tickets through Zoho Desk and place utility and home service orders on behalf of our clients. This role involves reviewing customer information, entering data into multiple portals, and ensuring each order is completed accurately and efficiently.



This position requires strong computer skills, reliable internet, excellent attention to detail, and comfort working with sensitive customer information in a PCI-compliant environment.



Key Responsibilities

Process incoming tickets in Zoho Desk from our customer support team



Review customer details and verify accuracy before entering into order portals



Place utility and home service orders (electricity, gas, internet, etc.) using client-provided platforms



Follow step-by-step procedures (SOPs) for each order type



Update ticket statuses, add notes, and close out completed tasks



Escalate any issues or missing information to the support team



Maintain confidentiality and follow all PCI compliance requirements



Complete all work with high accuracy and attention to detail



Required Skills & Qualifications

Experience as a Virtual Assistant or similar administrative role



Strong computer skills and ability to work with multiple websites/portals



Familiarity with Zoho Desk or other ticketing systems (preferred but not required)



Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in data entry



Ability to follow instructions and established processes



Strong time-management skills and ability to meet deadlines



Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace



Ability to handle sensitive customer information safely and professionally



Preferred Qualifications

Experience with customer support, and/or order processing



Familiarity with CRMs or customer management software



Prior PCI-compliance experience (not required but a bonus)



What We’re Looking For

Someone who is dependable and consistent



Someone who can follow procedures carefully



Someone who is comfortable doing repetitive but important tasks



Someone willing to learn and grow long-term with our team



Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in data entry

title: Remote Graphic Designer & Video Editor (AI Video Experience Required)
description:
**Job Title:** Remote Graphic Designer / Video Editor (AI Video Experience Required)



**Location:** Remote

**Schedule:** Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (US Pacific Standard Time)



**About the Role**

We are looking for a talented **Graphic Designer / Video Editor** to join our team in a fully remote role. This position focuses on creating engaging visual content for an established e-commerce business, including product graphics, marketing creatives, and promotional videos. A key part of this role involves producing **AI-generated videos** for marketing and promotional use.



**Responsibilities**



* Design marketing graphics for website banners,
 campaigns, ads, and social media.

* Edit and produce promotional and product videos.

* Create **AI-generated videos** for product promotions and marketing campaigns.

* Develop visually appealing content that aligns with the brand’s style and messaging.

* Collaborate with the marketing team to produce high-quality visual assets.

* Optimize images and videos for different platforms (website, advertising, and social media).



**Required Skills**



* Strong proficiency in **Adobe Creative Suite** (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects).

* Experience using other **graphic design and video editing software**.

* **Proven experience creating AI-generated videos** (this is a critical requirement).

* Strong understanding of modern design trends and video storytelling.

* **Excellent English communication skills** (written and spoken).

* Ability to work independently and meet deadlines in a remote work environment.



**Work Schedule**



* Monday to Friday

* **9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (US Pacific Standard Time)**

  Applicants must be able to consistently work during these hours.



**How to Apply (Important – Please Read Carefully)**

To be considered for this position, **you must include BOTH of the following**:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short video recording of yourself** explaining:



   * Your graphic design and video editing experience

   * Your experience creating **AI-generated videos**

   * The tools and software you regularly use



**Applications that do not include both the resume and the video introduction will not be considered.**



Please make sure you follow these instructions carefully when applying.

title: Reddit Marketing Assistant
description:
We’re looking for a Reddit Marketing Assistant to help grow awareness for an AI SaaS product through thoughtful, strategic participation across Reddit.



This role is not* about spamming links or posting obvious promotions. The focus is on creating indirect promotional content and relevant discussion threads, identifying relevant communities, joining conversations naturally, and helping position the product in a way that feels authentic and valuable to each subreddit.



What you’ll do



-Find relevant subreddits and discussions where our product or expertise is a natural fit

-Create and publish indirect promotional posts that feel organic to the community

-Engage in comments and discussions in a natural, helpful way

-Adapt posting style based on subreddit culture and rules

-Work from strategies, angles, and post concepts provided by the employer

-Suggest new Reddit growth ideas based on what is performing well

-Track post performance, engagement, and learnings



What we’re looking for



-Strong understanding of Reddit culture, tone, and etiquette

-Ability to write in a natural, non-corporate, non-salesy style

-Experience promoting products or brands through community-led content is a plus

-Good judgment around what works on Reddit and what gets ignored or downvoted

-Organized, proactive, and able to execute consistently



Ideal candidate

You understand the difference between promotion and participation. You know how to make a post feel native to a subreddit, how to start conversations, and how to build interest without making it feel forced.



Compensation

Open to hourly, part-time, or project-based depending on experience.



To apply, send:



- A short intro

- Any past experience with Reddit marketing, growth, or community engagement

- 2–3 examples of posts or campaigns you’ve with
