title: Offshore Accounting Reviewer (Technical Reviewer)
description:
Position Overview



Office Support Services is seeking a skilled Offshore Accounting Reviewer to perform technical reviews of bookkeeping work prepared by our internal bookkeeping team.



The reviewer is responsible for ensuring the accuracy, completeness, and consistency of financial records before financial statements are finalized and delivered to clients.



This role works closely with the CAS Manager and supports a team of bookkeepers responsible for maintaining accounting records for small business clients.



This role is not client-facing and focuses on technical accounting review and quality control.



Key Responsibilities

Accounting Review



• Review monthly bookkeeping work prepared by bookkeepers

• Review bank and credit card reconciliations

• Verify balances for loans, payroll liabilities, and balance sheet accounts

• Review general ledger classifications for accuracy

• Identify unusual or incorrect transactions



Month-End Close Support



• Confirm monthly close procedures are completed

• Review adjusting journal entries

• Ensure financial statements are accurate and ready for internal review



Technical Accounting Support



• Assist bookkeepers in correcting reconciliation or classification errors

• Provide guidance on proper account coding

• Identify inconsistencies in financial records when reviewing client accounts



Process Compliance



• Follow standardized month-end close checklist procedures

• Maintain documentation supporting reconciliations and adjustments

• Ensure financial records are complete and organized



Required Qualifications

Education



Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting or Finance



Professional Certification (Preferred)

• CPA

• Chartered Accountant (CA)

• CPA equivalent certification



Experience



• 5+ years accounting or bookkeeping experience

• 3+ years experience using QuickBooks Online

• Experience reviewing reconciliations and financial statements



Technical Skills



Strong working knowledge of:



• QuickBooks Online

• Bank and credit card reconciliations

• Journal entries

• Accrual accounting basics

• Balance sheet review

• Payroll accounting

• Sales tax accounting



Software Experience (Preferred)



• QuickBooks Online

• 

• Ramp

• Excel or Google Sheets



Key Competencies



• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to identify accounting errors

• Strong understanding of financial statements

• Organized and process-driven

• Ability to review multiple client accounts efficiently

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview: 



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office. 



 

Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 

About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 

Objectives: 

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.



 

Competencies: 

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.



 

Equipment Requirements:  

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



 

Physical Requirements: 

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

 

Benefits: 

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Operations & Transaction VA for Top Austin REALTOR® — Detail-Driven, Systems-Focused
description:
About This Role

This is a behind-the-scenes operations role that keeps a fast-moving real estate business running without missing a beat.



You won't be cold-calling clients. You won't be creating content. You will be the person who makes sure nothing falls through the cracks — ever.



If you're the type who gets satisfaction from a perfectly organized folder, a completed checklist, and a transaction that closes without drama — this is your seat.



What You'll Do

Transaction Coordination



Manage transaction files in Skyslope from contract to close

Organize and track all documents, deadlines, and signatures

Follow up on outstanding items and keep the timeline on track

Update listing and transaction status across platforms (Active, Pending, Sold). You'll also keep the client in the loop every step of the way, providing next steps, important dates, and an overall smooth transaction. 



General Admin Support

- Screening and responding to routine
s

- Competitor research

- Product/vendor comparisons

- Industry news monitoring and summarizing

- Formatting documents and reports

- Creating templates

- Online shopping and gift research 



Listing & Buyer Support

- Provide weekly tracking updates on all active listings and buyer clients

- Follow up on showing requests and coordinate scheduling

- Monitor feedback and compile reports for seller clients

- Keep all listing details accurate and current

- Create flyers, open house collateral, and other docs as needed from existing templates.



Calendar & Scheduling

- Manage appointments, showings, and follow-up calls

- Send reminders and confirmations

- Keep the agent's calendar organized and conflict-free



Research & Database Building

- Research neighborhoods, comps, and market data

- Build and format prospect and mailing list databases

- Download, clean, and organize contact lists for campaigns



Mail Merge & Outreach Support

- Run mail merge campaigns with precision

- Upload and tag contacts in CRM

- Support direct mail and
 list preparation



Document & File Organization

- Maintain a clean, logical Google Drive folder structure

- Name, sort, and archive files consistently

- Flag missing or incomplete documents immediately

- Create, update, and maintain SOPs



Who You Are

You are organized by nature, not by effort. You follow instructions exactly, ask clarifying questions before starting rather than after making mistakes, and you treat deadlines like they're non-negotiable — because in real estate, they are.



You don't need to be creative. You need to be reliable, precise, and proactive about problems.



Strong written English — clear and professional

Google Workspace proficient (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

Skyslope experience preferred — will train the right candidate

CRM experience a plus (tagging, uploading, segmenting)

Comfortable with mail merge and list formatting

Exceptional file organization habits

Reliable internet, available for partial U.S. Central Time overlap



Real estate experience preferred but not required — if you're detail-obsessed and a fast learner, we'll teach you the industry.



Work Details



20–30 hours/week to start, with growth potential

Pay based on experience

Daily end-of-day summary required (completed / pending / questions)

Weekly priorities provided by the team



HOW TO APPLY — Read This Carefully (Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.)



1. Basic Info

- Hourly rate request (USD)

- Hours available in U.S. Central Time

- Hours per week you're seeking



2. Writing Test — Do This First

A real estate agent asks you: "A transaction deadline was missed because a document wasn't submitted on time. How would you make sure that never happens again?"



Answer in your own words. Under 150 words. No AI.



We want to see how you think through problems and how you communicate solutions. We review enough applications to spot AI-generated responses immediately. Write it yourself.



3. Practical Task

Create a bullet-point checklist titled: "New Listing File Setup."

List every step you would take to set up a new listing file from scratch — documents, folders, platforms, tracking. There are no wrong answers. We want to see how you organize and sequence a workflow.



Write it yourself. AI submissions are removed without response.



4. Software Experience (Brief description of your experience with):



- Skyslope (or similar transaction management platforms)

- Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

- CRM platforms (any)

- Mail merge tools

- Social media platforms

- Design tools (Canva, Adobe Suite, etc.)

- AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)



5. Voice Sample

Record a 60–90 second audio clip. Introduce yourself and tell us: how do you stay organized when you're managing multiple deadlines at the same time?



We want to hear how you communicate and how you think before we ever get on a call.

title: Ads Account Manager (Facebook/Meta Ads)

Requirements



Experience managing
/Meta Ads accounts (1+ year minimum)

Comfortable working inside Meta Business Manager and Ads Manager

Strong attention to detail — you notice when something's off

Nice to Have

An example of a time you caught and fixed an issue before it became a bigger problem

title: Systems Coordinator
description:
Position Overview:  



The Systems Coordinator is responsible for creating, managing, and troubleshooting automation workflows in GoHighLevel (GHL) to support efficient operations across the company. This role requires at least one year of hands-on experience in GHL or a similar automation platform, along with strong analytical and problem-solving skills. In addition to system automation, this person will assist the Admin Operations Team with various ad hoc tasks and continuously seek opportunities to optimize workflows, eliminate inefficiencies, and enhance team productivity. 



 



Pay Range: $8 per hourwith a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 



About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems, LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 



Objectives: 



Build, maintain, and troubleshoot automation workflows in GoHighLevel to support streamlined operations. 



Monitor performance of active automations to ensure accuracy, functionality, and timely resolution of system issues. 



Work closely with the Operations Manager to understand workflow needs and translate them into effective and efficient automations, while coordinating with Admin Operations and other departments as needed. 



Identify inefficiencies in current processes and proactively recommend workflow improvements. 



Assist the Admin Operations Team with various administrative and operational tasks, ensuring smooth day-to-day operations. 



Troubleshoot and resolve Admin Operations Help Tickets with a customer-service–focused approach. 



Manage and update pipelines, triggers, automations, forms, and integrations as needed. 



Ensure all GHL data, workflows, and configurations are maintained accurately and consistently. 



 



Competencies: 



Strong understanding of automation logic, workflows, and pipeline management. 



High attention to detail to ensure accurate configuration and troubleshooting of automation sequences. 



Excellent problem-solving skills with the ability to identify system gaps and propose solutions. 



Strong written and verbal communication skills to work effectively with cross-functional teams. 



Proficiency in GoHighLevel or similar automation platforms (HubSpot, Zapier, Make, Zoho, ActiveCampaign, etc.). 



Ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously in a fast-paced environment. 



Proactive mindset with a drive for continuous improvement. 



Customer service orientation when supporting internal stakeholders. 



 



Equipment Requirements: 



Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently. 



High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work. 



 



Education and Experience: 



At least one year of hands-on experience with GoHighLevel or similar automation platforms. 



Experience in operations, administrative support, or systems management is a plus. 



Familiarity with CRM logic, automation mapping, or workflow design is strongly preferred. 



 



Physical Requirements: 



Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer. 



 



Benefits: 



Growth opportunities in a well-established company. 



Ongoing training and professional development opportunities. 



Opportunity for advancement within the company. 



A supportive and collaborative work environment. 



Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time). 



Paid vacation. 



 



How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalform 



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Human Resource Manager / Consultant
description:
Responsibilities



As part of your role, you shall be responsible for the following human resource management functions:



A. Recruiting



Assist in identifying, screening, and interviewing candidates for open positions.

Coordinate with hiring managers to define job requirements and candidate qualifications.

Maintain candidate databases and pipelines for current and future staffing needs.

Develop and maintain standardized interview question sets and scoring rubrics.

Ensure all recruiting practices remain compliant with federal and state regulations.



B. Hiring



Facilitate the full hiring cycle, including extending job offers and coordinating start dates.

Handle all new employee onboarding procedures, including orientation, HR paperwork, benefits explanation (if applicable), and initial training coordination.

Ensure smooth transition of new hires into their respective roles through first-week and first-30-day check-ins.

Maintain updated new-hire packets, onboarding manuals, and checklists.



C. Firing / Employee Separation



Provide expert guidance on employee termination matters to leadership.

Prepare termination documentation, notices, and compliance forms.

Conduct exit interviews and track feedback for organizational improvement.

Ensure all separation procedures comply with labor laws, internal policies, and risk-mitigation standards.



D. Implementing Policies



Develop, revise, and implement HR policies, SOPs, and procedural guidelines.

Ensure all HR policies align with federal/state employment laws, industry standards, and organizational goals.

Create clear policy summaries and distribute updates to staff.

Train supervisors and staff on policy changes and compliance expectations.

Track policy acknowledgment receipts for audit readiness.



E. Disciplinary Actions



Work with leadership to design, implement, and monitor disciplinary action plans.

Ensure accurate documentation of all violations, warnings, and corrective steps.

Maintain fairness, consistency, and legal compliance throughout all disciplinary processes.

Provide coaching to managers on how to conduct disciplinary conversations professionally.



F. Performance Improvement Plans (PIPs)



Draft and implement comprehensive Performance Improvement Plans tailored to the employee’s role and deficiencies.

Establish clear metrics, timelines, and expectations for improvement.

Conduct follow-up meetings and maintain documentation for legal and operational compliance.

Guide supervisors on how to hold employees accountable during the PIP period.

Recommend training, coaching, or corrective actions based on PIP outcomes.



G. HR Event Preparedness & Upcoming Events



Prepare HR-related support plans for upcoming events (e.g., company meetings, trainings, audits, reviews, compliance deadlines).

Coordinate employee schedules, attendance expectations, and pre-event communication.

Ensure staff receive proper notice regarding policy changes, company-wide updates, and HR-related deadlines.

Assist with planning for seasonal staffing fluctuations or expected organizational changes.

Maintain readiness for surprise audits, compliance inspections, or emergency staffing adjustments.



H. General HR Benchmarking & Best Practices



Maintain and update HR metrics (turnover rate, time-to-hire, employee engagement trends, attendance data).

Ensure HR files are audit-ready and comply with federal and state documentation standards.

Conduct periodic compliance audits for employee files, I-9 forms, contractor agreements, job descriptions, and training certifications.

Monitor industry trends and update HR policies to reflect best practices.

Create templates, checklists, dashboards, and reports to support efficient and modern HR operations.

Advise leadership on workforce planning, contractor utilization, and job-role optimization.

Support workplace culture initiatives that promote retention, productivity, and professional behavior.



Other HR Functions as Needed



Provide ongoing HR support to leadership and staff.

Recommend improvements in employee engagement, compliance, communication, and workplace culture.

Assist in investigations, conflict resolution, and mediation when necessary.

Maintain strict adherence to confidentiality, data protection standards, and ethical HR practices.



Qualifications



Proven experience as an HR Manager, HR Consultant, or similar HR leadership role.

Strong understanding of recruitment, employee relations, termination processes, compliance, and policy development.

Knowledge of federal and state labor laws, employment regulations, and compliance standards.

Excellent communication, interpersonal, and conflict-resolution skills.

Ability to handle sensitive information with confidentiality and professionalism.

Strong organizational and documentation skills.

Proficiency in HR software, ATS systems, and Microsoft Office/Google Workspace.

Bachelor’s degree in HR, Business Administration, or related field required; HR certification (PHR/SHRM-CP) preferred.



Performance Expectations – HR Manager/Consultant



Recruitment Efficiency: Present qualified candidates within the agreed timeline for all open roles.

Hiring Accuracy: Complete onboarding with 100% compliance for every new hire.

Termination Compliance: Ensure separations are executed professionally, legally, and in accordance with policy to minimize risk.

Policy Implementation: Deliver updated HR policies within agreed timeframes and ensure clear staff communication.

PIP Management: Develop and track performance improvement plans with measurable progress and proper documentation.

Disciplinary Oversight: Provide fair, consistent, timely disciplinary recommendations and ensure documentation integrity.

HR Responsiveness: Resolve HR issues promptly and provide timely guidance to leadership.

Compliance & Audit Readiness: Maintain HR records, files, and logs in audit-ready condition at all times.

Collaboration: Work effectively with leadership and staff to support overall organizational goals.

Confidentiality: Uphold the highest standards of discretion regarding all HR matters.

title: Customer Service Representative - Shopify
description:

Re:amaze (support help desk)

Shopify (eCommerce platform)

- Responding to customer
s regarding refunds, tracking numbers, and FAQs.

s exchanged with customers must be consistent, clear, and precise (e.g., no duplicate responses, vague answers, or off-topic replies).

Best regards,



Tess

 management, travel arrangements, and document organization.

title: Zoho CRM Developer
description:
Job Description: Zoho CRM Developer Supervisor



The Zoho CRM Developer is responsible for leading the technical development, customization, and integration of Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, Zoho One applications, and client/vendor portals. This role combines strong technical expertise with leadership skills to supervise a development team, support marketing and IT initiatives, and deliver scalable solutions aligned with organizational goals.



Key Responsibilities

1.. Zoho CRM & Zoho One Development



Configure, customize, and optimize Zoho CRM and Zoho One applications.

Build and maintain custom modules, workflows, automations, and dashboards.

Manage data migration, data cleansing, and ongoing CRM maintenance.

Ensure compliance with data security and governance standards.



2. Zoho Creator Application Development



Architect, design, and build custom business applications using Zoho Creator.

Write Deluge scripts for workflows, logic, and automation.

Design database structures, forms, and reports tailored to business needs.

Implement Blueprints and structured approval processes.

Build and maintain client/vendor portals for external stakeholders.

Integrate Zoho Creator apps with CRM, Desk, Books, and third-party systems.



3. Portal Design & User Experience



Develop and oversee client-facing portals within Zoho Creator and WordPress.

Collaborate with marketing to align portal design with branding and customer journey.

Ensure portals are responsive, user-friendly, and secure.

Implement role-based access, dashboards, and document-sharing features.

Integrate Zoho portals with WordPress or other web platforms when needed.



4. Integration Management



Oversee integrations between Zoho apps and third-party platforms (
, Zapier, RingCentral, Twilio, 
, etc.).

Develop and maintain API-based integrations for seamless data flow.

Troubleshoot and resolve integration issues quickly.



5. Ticketing System Oversight (Zoho Desk)



Design, implement, and optimize Zoho Desk for customer support.

Create efficient workflows for ticket capture, routing, and resolution.

Train staff on proper use of the ticketing system.



6. AI & Automation



Implement and manage AI-driven tools (Zoho Zia, chatbots, Chatic Media AI Program).

Continuously refine AI programs to improve accuracy and customer experience.

Identify opportunities for automation to reduce manual work.



7. Marketing & Website Support (WordPress)



Provide technical support to the marketing team for website projects.

Manage and customize WordPress themes, plugins, and portals.

Work with PHP, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS to enhance site functionality.

Ensure seamless integration of WordPress with Zoho CRM/Creator via APIs and plugins.

Support SEO, site performance optimization, and security best practices.



8. Vendor & Project Coordination



Act as liaison with Zoho, 
, Zapier, and hosting/IT vendors.

Manage contracts, procurement, and escalated technical issues.

Oversee IT-related projects from planning to execution.



9. Advisory Role



Serve as a technical advisor to the CEO on CRM, IT, and automation strategies.

Provide performance reports on CRM usage, portal adoption, and IT initiatives.

Recommend emerging technologies that improve efficiency and customer experience.



10. Training, Documentation & Support



Create SOPs, training materials, and technical documentation.

Conduct training sessions for staff and end users.

Provide escalated IT and Zoho-related support when necessary.



Qualifications



Experience:

5+ years of experience as a Zoho CRM/Zoho Creator Developer.



Technical Expertise:



Mastery of Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, Zoho Desk, Zoho Books, and Zoho One applications.

Strong knowledge of Deluge scripting and Zoho Creator app building.

Experience with Blueprints, portals, client/vendor dashboards, and workflows.

Proficiency in WordPress development (PHP, JavaScript/React, HTML, CSS, MySQL).

Experience with API integrations (REST, SOAP, OAuth 2.0, JSON, XML).

Knowledge of UI/UX best practices, responsive design, and branding alignment.

Familiarity with SEO, site performance optimization, and website security.

Understanding of data security, GDPR/CCPA compliance, and IT governance.



Additional Skills:

Strong project management and vendor coordination abilities.

Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and decision-making skills.

Effective communication skills for working across technical and non-technical teams.

Ability to balance multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.



Education:

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field preferred.

Relevant Zoho or WordPress certifications a plus.



Key Competencies:

Technical problem-solving

Business process automation

Portal and UI/UX design

Cross-departmental collaboration (IT + Marketing + Operations)

Strong attention to detail and quality assurance

title: SOCIAL MEDIA EDITOR
description:
We are looking for a proactive Social Media Editor who to help grow our football/soccer e-commerce dropshipping brand in  through consistent, engaging content on Instagram and TikTok.



You will be responsible for sourcing, curating and editing high-quality, short form content content and posting based on a structured content plan.You will work closely with the co-founders in a close-knit, fast-moving team — trusted to operate independently, edit at pace, and maintain high standards across everything you post.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Creative Execution: Edit and deliver short-form video content for Meta, TikTok and Instagram — maintaining the brand's aesthetic and cultural tone.

- Content Sourcing: Source and curate relevant content — UGC clips, trending football 
nts, product footage — when raw footage is not available.

- Social Media Management: Post consistently across Instagram and TikTok and manage Stories daily to build community.

- Paid-Ready Content: Create and edit content with paid social in mind — understanding that every piece of organic content could be amplified through Meta or TikTok ads, and editing accordingly with strong hooks, clean pacing, and clear messaging that works in both contexts.

- Hook Development: Contribute content strategy with ideas.

- Trend Research: Stay ahead of platform trends and football culture 
nts. Surface opportunities proactively before they're obvious.

- Brand Consistency: Help every piece of content must reflect our visual identity and tone.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Experience managing Instagram and TikTok accounts for a brand — you can show growth and consistency

- Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or equivalent — you have a tool you're fast in 

- Proven portfolio of short-form content that has performed — links/references you can show are preferred

- Comfortable sourcing and curating content when raw footage isn't available

- Genuine interest in football/soccer niche

- Organised and reliable — you can follow a content schedule and hit deadlines consistently

- Able to operate independently with minimal oversight



IDEAL CANDIDATE ALSO HAS:

- Experience with a DTC or e-commerce brand

- Good eye for viral content, trends, and storytelling

- Comfortable with AI tools — CapCut AI, working with AI-generated assets

- You're proactive — you pitch ideas, flag opportunities, suggest formats before being asked



IMPORTANT NOTE:

To show you've read this listing in full, please include the word "Football Content" at the start of your application message. Applications without this will not be reviewed.

title: UI/UX Web Designer
description:
We are seeking a talented and creative UI/UX Web Designer with a strong background in visual design and user experience. The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating intuitive and engaging user interfaces for our web applications and platforms.



If you’re passionate about design and want to create impactful user experiences, we’d love to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities:

- Wireframing and Prototyping: Create wireframes, prototypes, and mockups to visualize design concepts and user flows, ensuring that the design meets user needs and business goals.

- User Research: Conduct user research and usability testing to gather insights and validate design concepts, ensuring that user needs are met.

- Collaboration: Work closely with product managers, developers, and other stakeholders to design user-centered solutions that enhance the overall user experience..

- Visual Design: Develop the visual aspects of the website, including color schemes, typography, and layout, to create an aesthetically pleasing and cohesive user interface.

- Interaction Design: Designing interactive elements of the website, such as buttons, forms, and navigation, to enhance user engagement and improve usability.

- Usability Testing: Conducting usability tests to gather feedback on design prototypes and making iterative improvements based on user feedback.

- Responsive Design: Ensuring that the website is responsive and provides a seamless experience across various devices and screen sizes.

- Feedback Incorporation: Iterate designs based on user feedback and analytics to continuously improve the user experience.

- Documentation: Create and maintain design documentation, style guides, and design systems to ensure consistency across all products.

- Stay Current: Keeping abreast of industry trends, tools, and best practices in UI/UX design to continuously improve skills and design quality.



Qualifications:

- Minimum of 2+ years of experience in UI/UX design roles, ideally with a focus on web applications or websites.

- A degree in Graphic Design, Web Design, Human-Computer Interaction, or a related field.

- Certifications in UI/UX design or related disciplines can be beneficial.

- Strong portfolio showcasing design projects that highlight your problem-solving skills and creativity in UI/UX design.

- Proficiency in design and prototyping tools such as Adobe Creative Suite, Sketch, Figma, or similar software.

- Understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to effectively communicate with developers.

- Experience in conducting user research, usability testing, and gathering user feedback to inform design decisions.

- Solid understanding of user-centered design principles and methodologies.

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to present and explain design concepts to various stakeholders.

- Ability to collaborate effectively in a team environment and manage multiple projects simultaneously.

title: Operations/Guest Specialist
description:
Role: Guest Specialist, full-time

Schedule: 44 hours/week, PST time zone: 3 days from 9am to 9pm, and the fourth day is a half day (4 days on, 3 days off)



Are you an Airbnb professional with a knack for exceptional communication and a deep understanding of the short-term rental market? Do you thrive in optimizing property listings, building and managing teams, and ensuring top-notch guest experiences? If so, we have an exciting opportunity for you to join our company and play a pivotal role in our journey to success in the world of short-term rentals!



What We're Looking For:

-High Attention to Detail While Multitasking: Keen attention to detail while efficiently managing competing priorities and tight deadlines.  You are naturally organized and know how to create efficient processes to maintain successful operations and never let anything slip through the cracks. 

- Great Communicator: You possess exceptional communication skills that extend from interacting with guests to collaborating with tea
mbers, vendors, and your manager.  Fluency in English is a must.  You can answer questions directly and efficiently and provide succinct answers.

- Self Starter: You take direction and feedback and know how to execute with precision with little oversight.  You have wonderful critical thinking and problem-solving skills—you can think outside the box, see the big picture, and understand how your decisions have downstream impacts. 

- Flawless Executor: You are more focused on getting it right and the impacts it will have when it comes to tasks rather than just checking it off your list to move on to the next task.  You are aware of how your decisions impact others. 

- Experienced Airbnb Professional: Your track record includes a substantial background in developing and managing Airbnb listings and delivering top-notch guest experiences.

- Tracking Expert: You have systems to track everything from inventory to claims submissions to homeowner payouts.  You do all of this with precision.

- Listing Maestro: Crafting attractive and appealing property listings that are optimized that capture potential guests’ attention is in your wheelhouse.





**Key Responsibilities:**

- Serve as the right hand to the CEO: provide high-level support in managing day-to-day operations, strategic initiatives, and organizational priorities.  This includes running company meetings, drafting briefs with information and recommendations for the CEO to make decisions, prioritizing and deprioritizing tasks for the CEO to dedicate time to based on organizational priorities, communication with the CEO’s clients, etc. 

- Conduct thorough vetting of tea
mbers to ensure quality service delivery.

- Build, manage, and lead a team of handymen, cleaners, maintenance personnel, and VAs.  Must have experience interviewing and hiring. 

- Manage and optimize property listings on platforms like Airbnb, VRBO, and others.

- Manage the day-to-day operations of our properties, including guest communications, reservations, check-ins and check-outs, inventory management and ordering, .

- Monitor and coordinate property cleaning and maintenance to ensure properties are well maintained and ready for our next guest arrival.

- Manage and oversee new property onboarding.

- Keep track of property-related finances and maintain accurate records including reconciling accounts.

- Address guest concerns and resolve issues in a timely and professional manner.  Follow up on issues to ensure we have strong processes, so the same issues do not arise in the future. 

- Screen potential guests.

- Continuously improve property listings and guest experiences.

- Other duties as assigned.

- Implement dynamic pricing strategies to optimize rental income.



**Qualifications:**

MUST be former AIRBNB employee

MUST have short term property management experience outside of Airbnb (25+ properties)



- EXCEPTIONAL attention to detail and EXCELLENT organizational skills.

- A self-starter with outstanding critical thinking skills.

- Proven experience in Airbnb property management or related roles.

- Strong understanding of the short-term rental market and guest expectations.

- Strong understanding for Airbnb Claims/review removal

- Excellent command of English, both written and verbal.

- Proficiency in property management platforms (Hospitable) and Microsoft suite.

- Problem-solving abilities and a customer-centric mindset.

- Marketing and social media skills for property promotion are desirable.

- Available to work flexible hours, including weekends and holidays.



If you're an Airbnb professional ready to take on a new challenge and contribute to the success of a growing, *female-founded* company, we want to hear from you! Apply now by sending an
 to 
 with “ROCKSTAR EMPLOYEE” as the subject line with a copy of your resume, why you are a good fit for the role, and your length of experience at Airbnb and/or other short term rental client(s). Let's work together to elevate our properties, guest experiences, and take our company to new heights!

title: Forex Virtual Assistant
description:
I am looking for a disciplined and experienced Forex Trader in the Philippines to manage my trading account. Your primary responsibility will be to execute trades based on a specific
 signal group I am a member of, while also identifying high-probability setups using your own strategy.



Key Responsibilities:



Signal Monitoring: Stay active on my
 account during [Insert Session, e.g., London/New York] sessions.



Trade Execution: Manually enter trades on MetaTrader 4/5 (MT4/MT5) exactly as posted in the group (Entry, SL, and TP).



Risk Management: Strictly follow my risk parameters (e.g., 1% risk per trade). No over-leveraging or "revenge trading" allowed.



Journaling: Maintain a daily log of all trades taken, including wins, losses, and why certain signals were or weren't taken.



Own Analysis: When signals are slow, you are encouraged to take trades based on your own proven strategy (must be discussed first).



Requirements:



Proven Experience: At least 2+ years of experience trading Forex.



Technical Skills: Deep understanding of MT4/MT5, lot sizing, and pips.



Equipment: Reliable high-speed internet and a backup power source (essential for PH-based roles due to outages).



Discipline: Ability to follow instructions without emotion. If the signal says "Close now," you close now.



Communication: Fluent English and highly responsive during market hours.



How to Apply:



Send your resume and a brief summary of your trading experience.



Crucial: Provide a screenshot or link to a Verified Track Record (MyFxBook, or past trading history).



Use the subject line "DISCIPLINED TRADER" so I know you read this.

title: Video Editor
description:
Moe’s Group is HIRING a Content Creator/Video Editor!



We’re looking for a creative Video Editor to produce engaging short-form videos, thumbnails, and social posts that reflect our brand. The ideal candidate has a strong portfolio, sharp storytelling skills, and an eye for design and trends. Social media management experience is a plus.



About Us:

Moe’s Group is a global leader in skincare manufacturing, trusted by over 100 international brands. We combine innovation, quality, and a personalized approach to help businesses scale and succeed in competitive markets. From manufacturing to brand strategy, our end-to-end services are designed to exceed expectations, backed by a team committed to customer satisfaction and long-term success. At Moe’s Group, we don’t just support brands—we empower them to lead. 



What you’ll do:

- Edit short-form videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, etc.) using Adobe Premiere or any comparable tool.

- Design eye-catching thumbnails, social posts, and covers using Canva or similar platforms.

- Align all creative work with our brand’s storytelling, typography, and color guidelines.

- Collaborate on content ideas, trends, and strategies to produce engaging, shareable videos.



What we’re looking for:

- A strong portfolio of video content that shows storytelling ability and visual flair.

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere or other editing software (no strict platform required).

- Understanding of typography, color, and brand consistency.

- Awareness of social media trends and how to create content that resonates.

- Experience with social media management, in addition to content creation, is a plus

- Able to work in the Pacific Time (PT) timezone.



Why join us?

- 100% remote work opportunity

- Long-term stable job with significant room for professional growth.

- Fixed Weekends Off

- All necessary tools, courses, and subscriptions provided.



Learn more about our company by visiting our website: 
. For the latest updates and opportunities, follow us on LinkedIn:

title: Expert AI Video Editor for Meta Ads (UGC, VSL, High-Converting Creatives)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled AI Video Editor who can create high-converting Meta ad creatives from scratch.



This includes:



• UGC style ads

• Direct response ads

• Product ads

• AI generated visuals & scenes

• Full creative production



You should be able to handle everything from concept to final video.



We are an e-commerce brand and produce creatives on a weekly basis.



This will be a long-term position if the quality is good.



?

AI Tools such as:



• Higgsfield / Freepik

• Pika

• CapCut / Premiere Pro

And understand:



• Meta Ads

• Hooks & retention

• UGC style editing



?



What you will deliver:



• Complete ready-to-run ads

• Multiple variations per creative

• Fast turnaround (24-72h preferred)



?



IMPORTANT: To apply, answer these questions:

1. Send your BEST Meta ad creatives portfolio (REQUIRED)

2. Which AI tools do you use?

3. Have you made ads for e-commerce brands before?

Start your application with the word: CREATIVE



Applications without portfolio will be ignored.







Budget



Start: $10 per video

title: Creative Generalist & Creative Strategist
description:
CREATIVE GENERALIST



We’re hiring a Creative Generalist with strong design and video editing chops to produce compelling visual assets for our paid media campaigns, landing pages, and brand communication. This hybrid role supports 2–3 DTC brands to start and is perfect for someone who thrives on fast-paced creative production, balancing aesthetics with performance goals. You’ll be responsible for creating everything from static ads and animated social assets to UGC edits and conversion-driven landing page graphics.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design static, motion, and video ad creatives for Meta, TikTok, and Google

- Edit high-performing UGC ads with strong hooks, CTAs, captions, and transitions

- Repurpose testimonials, reviews, and influencer content for paid and organic use

- Create
, SMS, and promotional visuals aligned with brand identity

- Stylize social proof assets (e.g., screenshots, quotes) into branded, engaging formats

- Follow platform-specific best practices for ad creatives

- Ensure design supports performance goals like ROAS and CAC

- Maintain brand consistency across diverse formats and placements

- Collaborate with media buyers, marketers, and creatives to meet campaign goals

- Stay current with trends in ad design and DTC creative performance



Qualifications:

- At least 2 years of experience in graphic design and video editing for digital marketing.

- Advanced skills in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects).

- Proven experience creating high-converting static and motion ads for Meta, TikTok, or Google.

- Strong eye for layout, color, typography, and brand consistency.

- Experience editing UGC and social proof content for performance-driven campaigns.

- Able to follow creative briefs, meet tight deadlines, and collaborate well with remote teams.

- Portfolio demonstrating versatility across static design, motion, and video editing.





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





CREATIVE STRATEGIST



The Creative Strategist will own the research, ideation, and optimization of creative assets across paid ads,
/SMS, landing pages, and UGC. They'll translate brand goals, market data, and consumer psychology into briefs, scripts, and testing roadmaps, partnering with designers, editors, media buyers, and UGC creators to execute.



This role focuses on conversion optimization and creative direction — guiding creative generalists, reviewing and approving output, and ensuring all creatives are aligned with CRO goals. The strategist does not handle direct web design, but must have strong CRO experience to boost campaign effectiveness.



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze client creative performance, benchmark competitors, and identify positioning and messaging opportunities across the full funnel.

- Develop creative roadmaps for DTC brands, concept new hooks and angles, and build testing frameworks across multiple ad formats.

- Create detailed UGC briefs, collaborate with creators through production, and curate social proof for ads and owned channels.

- Partner with media buyers and cross-functional teams to ensure creative aligns with funnel stages, KPIs, and brand standards.

- Guide creative generalists and support
/SMS and CRO-focused landing page strategy without executing web design.

- Track and interpret performance data, document insights, and iterate continuously to optimize campaigns.

- Present strategies, testing plans, and performance recaps to clients and internal leadership to support retention and revenue goals.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and creative strategy for digital marketing.

- Ability to analyze creative performance metrics and translate data insights into actionable design or messaging improvements.

- Strong leadership and feedback skills to guide generalists and align creative output with performance goals.

- Ability to drive creative decisions that enhance campaign effectiveness and conversion rates.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



Ready to take your skills to the next level? If this role feels like the right fit for you, don’t wait—apply today and join a team where your impact truly matters.



Have questions or want to follow up on your application? Feel free to reach out to us at

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
I'm the founder of a digital growth marketing company that helps mission-driven founders scale their businesses with more ease & less overwhelm - and I'm looking for a small team of highly-skilled Executive Assistants to help take over the marketing and management tasks that make a huge difference in the lives of the people that hire us.



I'm looking for a max of 5 amazing executive assistants available for part-time (potential for full time) with a salary starting at $500 USD per month and with long term success and robust training, moving up to $700 USD per month as an emerging leader in the company.



If you have the following skill sets, I encourage you to apply:



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

- Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in Digital Marketing, Video Editing, Social Media Management, Content Creation, and Executive Assistant Work (Administrative Tasks, Calendar &
 Management, etc)

You’re trusted to manage marketing deliverables while providing high-level executive support, keeping priorities organized, systems moving, and leadership focused on growth instead of day-to-day execution. You've done it all from managing schedules to
 & calendar management. You have a meticulous eye for detail where Prioritization and Organization are your love language



-- 1+ years of experience in Sales Funnels and Shopify

You're a professional who is passionate about helping changemakers simplify their lives by setting up systems that will allow them to operate their businesses with more ease and less overwhelm. You have experience with sales funnel and CRM software



- 1+ years of experience advertising on platforms like Instagram,
, Tik Tok, within a Marketing team consisting of Paid Acquisition, Organic Marketing, Customer Retention, & Product Marketing

You're an emerging leader who has the potential to head a team in the future that will report directly to you. Having leadership experience is a MAJOR plus



- Creating SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)

You’ll ensure each business function has detailed documentation for repeatable and scalable growth if it isn't already place. If you see gaps, you take the initiative to fill them and produce results without anyone knowing there was an issue (yea, all that and a bag of chips :-)



- Experience working at a digital/online product/platform: You’re familiar with online courses, digital products & platforms and popular tools in the business space ranging from landing page builders and
 service providers to CRMs, and course hosting platforms aren’t foreign to you (We teach tools like Shopify, Convertkit, Kajabi, Teachable, Learnworlds, Calendly, etc)



ABOUT YOU:

- “You down with SOP? Yeah you know me!”—You’re an advocate for SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) to make our systems repeatable & scalable.

- Your love language is processes & predictable, meteoric growth. We never question company progress towards the quarterly and yearly goals because you keep real-time metrics for all projects.

- You’re aware of new software and can look at current systems and identify how to automate tasks a company has been doing manually for months.

- You’re addicted to digital processes & automation in the world of social media because you love building connections in the digital space and you’ve seen how powerful it can be in business growth

- You’re driven by metrics & tracking. You know that you can’t improve something unless you measure it, so you develop ways to measure performance so your company is always predictably improving.

- Timeliness and deadlines are your jam. When we have a team call at 10:00am, you show up at 9:55am. When the deadline is Tuesday at 5:30pm, you have it done Monday.

- You overcommunicate clearly and confidently. If you agree/disagree with something, you communicate that without hesitation or overthinking. You’re no stranger to asking why we do things a certain way to ensure we’re intentional with our resources.

- You’re a leader and team player. Ego? What ego? If something needs to be done, you dive in to make sure all critical tasks are accounted and cared for.



If you’re nodding your head “Yes” to the above, proceed below to apply.



PERKS:

I'm committed to setting our staff up for success with access to trainings that will certify your skills in:

- Task & Calendar Management

- Launch/Sales Strategy Planning

- Sales Funnel Tech Setup (For E-Commerce or Service Based Businesses)

- Social Media Management

- Digital Media Marketing (Including
 and SMS Marketing)

- Lead Generation



After one week of training and assessment, you're officially certified under our internal training program, which means hitting the ground running with your new skills. Perks include:

- Part time work hours

- Work from anywhere in the world (as long as your internet signal is strong and computer is fast)

- Starting Salary at $500 USD a month ($6000 USD annual)

- Internal certification program to enhance your professional skills in your career (I have helped clients amass at least $10M from the same digital growth marketing strategies I will require you to learn)



Interested? Please reply to this post with the secret keyword "APPLES" so I know you can pay attention to detail - from there, I'll let you know next steps if you qualify.

title: Senior Developer & IT Documentation Specialist
description:
SENIOR DEVELOPER



We are looking for a Senior Developer who is a versatile, all-around technical expert capable of managing end-to-end development of systems, applications, and web platforms. The ideal candidate thrives in a remote, collaborative environment and is comfortable supporting cross-functional teams with both front-end and back-end solutions, system integrations, automation, and technical troubleshooting.



This role requires a highly organized, detail-oriented, and technology-focused professional who can communicate effectively across teams, manage complex workflows, and adapt quickly to new tools and processes.



Key Responsibilities:

- Full-Stack Development & Systems Management: Design, develop, and maintain web applications, internal tools, and CMS platforms (especially WordPress); build front-end and back-end functionality, troubleshoot issues, and document systems for team accessibility.

- Integrations & Automation: Implement API integrations, database connections, and workflow automation using tools like Zapier; maintain and support company software and applications across multiple platforms.

- Data Analysis & Reporting: Analyze data, create dashboards and visualizations, and use reporting tools to support decision-making while ensuring system security and compliance.

- Collaboration & Team Support: Work closely with marketing, operations, and leadership teams; communicate technical solutions clearly; provide guidance, mentorship, and contribute to process improvements.

- Onboarding & Knowledge Sharing: Train tea
mbers, document workflows and technical tools, and support ad-hoc tasks to improve team efficiency and continuity.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in full-stack development or systems development, including front-end and back-end technologies.

- Proficiency in WordPress and other CMS platforms.

- Strong understanding of IT procedures, system architecture, and security practices.

- Proficiency with Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, Excel, and data visualization tools.

- Experience with APIs, database integration, and automation tools (Zapier, HubSpot, Airtable).

- Excellent analytical, logical thinking, and problem-solving skills.

- Strong attention to detail, organization, and ability to prioritize tasks.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills.

- Ability to work independently and effectively in a remote work environment.

- Strong interpersonal skills and cross-team collaboration abilities.



Nice to have:

- Experience with Amazon Seller Central, Helium 10, or other e-commerce platforms.

- Familiarity with project management tools like 
, Asana, Slack, and Time Doctor.

- Knowledge of security protocols and IT compliance standards.

- Experience in digital marketing technology applications and online marketing workflows.

- Understanding of cloud-based systems and SaaS platforms.





-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





IT DOCUMENTATION SPECIALIST



The IT Documentation Specialist will create, update, and maintain documentation related to IT systems and processes. This will include writing Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), creating flow charts, and troubleshooting IT documents to ensure accuracy and compliance. This role will serve as a primary technical resource for updates to the relevant documentation.



Responsibilities:

- Identify the need for, and create documents related to, IT systems and processes.

- Document IT processes such as business requirements, design reviews, system setup, configuration, user access, and security.

- Write SOPs to ensure processes are well documented.

- Create flow charts and other visuals to improve readability.

- Review and monitor documentation for accuracy and changes as needed.

- Respond promptly to requests for updates or new documents.

- Stay up to date on IT system processes and trends.

- QA Tasks to ensure that tasks are error-free

- Proactively contribute to providing strategies for training and upskill advancements

- Always come prepared

- Assignments are properly actioned and handled per mag standards

- Act as a direct liaison between end users and IT, and help share knowledge in the org through documentation



Qualifications:

- 1+ years of experience in a similar role

- Bachelor’s degree in IT, computer science, or other relevant fields

- Exceptional communication capabilities, both written and verbal

- Ability to multitask and prioritize

- Proven ability to understand and write technical documents

- In-depth knowledge of IT systems and processes

- Proficient with Microsoft Office, G Suite applications, and computer security systems

- Proficient with, or able to quickly become proficient with, a range of general and specialized applications, software, and hardware used in the organization and the industry.

- Expert in problem-solving, critical thinking, and an understanding of complex system dependencies



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



This might be the role you’ve been aiming for. If you’re ready to take your skills to the next level, we’d love to hear from you. Apply now!



Have questions? Reach out to us at

title: Marketing Systems & Growth Architect
description:
The Marketing Systems & Growth Architect will own, rebuild, and scale My Amazon Guy’s marketing infrastructure, with a primary focus on HubSpot architecture, lifecycle automation, attribution clarity, and governance standards. This is a systems-first, hands-on role responsible for transforming our CRM and marketing automation ecosystem into a clean, scalable, revenue-driving engine. This is not a brand marketing or campaign execution role. This is a technical marketing systems leadership position focused on structure, integrity, and long-term scalability.



Key Responsibilities:

- Audit, clean, and restructure CRM data, workflows, lifecycle stages, and automation

- Remove deprecated assets, deduplicate records, and eliminate redundant processes

- Establish clear lifecycle definitions, segmentation logic, and governance standards

- Build intent-based segmentation and automated journeys tied to revenue movement

- Align marketing automation with sales handoffs and outbound outreach

- Prevent overlapping messaging and ensure accurate intent-driven actions

- Standardize tracking, UTMs, and attribution across marketing and sales platforms

- Improve visibility into MQL ? SQL ? Opportunity progression and reporting accuracy

- Reduce unnecessary broadcast activity and reporting ambiguity

- Implement request protocols, documentation, and long-term system governance



Qualifications:

- 5+ years in Marketing Operations, RevOps, or Marketing Technology

- Deep, hands-on HubSpot experience (required)

- Proven experience cleaning and restructuring complex CRM environments

- Strong understanding of paid media funnels and conversion tracking

- Experience with lifecycle marketing, lead scoring, and segmentation frameworks

- Experience building or restructuring automation systems

- Comfortable enforcing governance and setting system standards

- Experience working with distributed teams (Filipino team experience preferred)



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



You’re exactly who we’re looking for—so what’s stopping you? Apply now and let’s make it official.



Follow-up
s are welcome at

title: Outbound Sales Development Representative & Business Development Representative
description:
OUTBOUND SALES DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



This role is strategically focused on generating new business opportunities through targeted outbound outreach. The Outbound SDR serves as the first point of contact for potential clients, identifying prospects, initiating conversations, and driving them into the sales pipeline. You will manage outbound campaigns, conduct personalized outreach, and build strong engagement with high-value leads. This position requires strong persistence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to build effective processes for high-touch outbound engagement.



Goal:

To create a steady flow of qualified outbound opportunities by identifying, engaging, and advancing potential clients into meaningful sales conversations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Outbound Prospecting: Identify and target potential clients through
, calls, and social outreach to generate qualified leads for the sales team.

- Personalized Outreach: Create tailored messaging for specific industries, decision-makers, or company profiles to increase engagement and response rates.

- Pipeline Generation: Build and maintain a strong pipeline of outbound leads, ensuring consistent activity and follow-ups.

- Lead Qualification: Evaluate outbound prospects to ensure alignment with service offerings and pass qualified opportunities to the sales team.

- Collaboration With Sales & Marketing: Work closely with sales to refine ideal client profiles and with marketing to improve outbound messaging and campaign performance.

- CRM Management: Keep detailed, accurate records of outreach activity, follow-ups, and prospect interactions within the CRM.

- Process Building & Optimization: Develop, refine, and scale processes for efficient and high-touch outbound engagement.



Qualifications:

- Experience in outbound sales, lead generation, or a similar role is preferred.

- Strong organizational skills with excellent attention to detail.

- Proven track record of consistently meeting or exceeding outreach and pipeline targets.

- Advanced knowledge of HubSpot preferred; experience with other CRM tools is a plus.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

- Motivated self-starter with the ability to work independently and drive tasks forward.

- Comfortable with leadership, taking initiative, and improving workflows.

- Strong interpersonal skills: able to communicate value clearly, handle objections, and build rapport during outbound conversations.

- Has a history of building processes around high-touch outbound client engagement.





--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



Do you enjoy doing sales while collaborating with people? How about doing content on TikTok, Instagram, or on Loom? Can you express yourself fluently in English? If you said yes to all three, My Amazon Guy has the perfect job offer for you!



In summary, you will record tutorials or audits using Loom to get sales leads for our Agency. You will be setting up appointments, and doing
 management to schedule prospective clients w/ our Sales Managers.



If you are direct and to the point, you will fit in at MAG!



Key Responsibilities:

- Send a minimum of 17 videos daily or 85 videos weekly

- 2 Booked Calls Per Week

- Call 14-18 prospects to follow up daily.

- Send daily reports to your assigned direct manager/supervisor

- Keep an eye on Slack, especially Sales channels

- Attend weekly sync with the Business Development Representatives (BDR) Team

- Attend a one-on-one meeting with the BDR Team Lead

- Watch 5 different people's videos every week.

- Complete at least 4 MAG courses



Qualifications:

- Excellent communication and engagement skills.

- Ability to multi-task and produce high-quality content online.

- Knows how to be professional yet must be fun and creative in making content ideas.

- Motivated, Driven, Tech Savvy, Sociable Go Getters (No experience required, we will train the right candidate)

- Should have a professional work area to do content (clear camera and audio)

- Ability to build relationships and collaborate effectively through videos.

- Must be tech-savvy and familiar with current trends.

- Be organized and input potential leads into our CRM (Customer Relationship) software and follow up according to our agency standards

- Driven to make 20 loom videos (sales outreach)



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent WFH setup

- Unlimited FREE access to MAG School courses and SOP Library!

- Work schedule is in EST (Monday-Friday only)

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



Why wait for permission to level up? Apply now and step into a role where your skills are truly valued.



Follow up anytime at

title: Amazon Brand Manager & Brand Manager Intern
description:
AMAZON BRAND MANAGER



We are looking for a talented and versatile Amazon Brand Manager! If you think that you have what it takes to be successful in this role, we welcome you to apply!



Do you like going from one meeting to another with non-stop action and solving problems every day while managing 8 people? Where you are trying to please clients and juggling tons of competing priorities? If so, this is the job for you.



Brand Managers own the relationships at our agency. It’s your job to make customers like us while delivering our team’s accurate non-stop activities.



Responsibilities:

- Manage clients' accounts assigned. The Brand Manager will act as the direct point of contact for the client, responsible for coordinating MAGs services, implementing strategy, communicating with clients, direct reports, and leadership.

- 2+ Direct Reports. In addition to client services, this position is also a managerial position, and following the completion of training, brand managers will be expected to lead a small team of Amazon specialists, who will assist the manager with delivering MAG services to the client.

- Brand managers are the company's backbone, directly responsible for our client accounts.

- Proactively provide a strategy for the account, communicate with the client, and ensure MAG process and deliverables are met.

- Delegate tasks properly to your direct reports and the MAG teams, follow up on delegations, hold staff accountable, and report back to the client.



Qualifications:

- Amazon Expertise: 1+ year with Seller Central (flat files, FBA, PPC, SEO, reinstatements, brand registry, Helium10, keyword research).

- Agency & Management: Experience handling multiple demands, leading teams, hiring, and performance management.

- Project & Client Management: Skilled in multitasking, project management, client communication, and account ownership.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable with tools like Zoom, Slack, Asana, and adapting in fast-changing environments.

- Passion for eCommerce: Independent, people-focused, and driven to grow client sales on Amazon.



Expectations:

- Competitive salary!

- Fun Fully Remote Culture – Community Culture, Team Oriented Environment

Compensation & Schedule

Remote / Virtual Position 

 

About the Role 

We are seeking a highly organized, detail-driven Virtual Assistant to support purchasing, inventory control, warehouse coordination, and vendor communications for a fast-paced U.S.-based HVAC company. 

This role directly supports ownership, shop management, dispatch, and field technicians to ensure parts, equipment, and materials are available for jobs without delays. 

If you excel in structured environments, communicate clearly in English, and can manage vendors, inventory, and purchase orders efficiently, this role may be an excellent fit.

title: Data Analyst – Lead & Call Performance
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Remote Position

Location: Remote

Schedule: Full-Time (40 hrs/week)

Industry: Performance Marketing & Lead Generation

About Us

We are a performance marketing company that generates high-intent inbound leads and phone calls for businesses across the United States in industries such as home services and legal services.



Our company runs large-scale marketing campaigns across multiple channels and generates thousands of leads and calls every week. Because of this, our business is highly data-driven. Decisions about marketing budgets, campaign optimization, and partner performance are based heavily on analytics.



We are looking for a Data Analyst whose primary responsibility will be digging deeply into our lead and call data to uncover insights that improve performance and profitability.



This is not an administrative or bookkeeping position.

This role is focused on data investigation, analysis, and performance insights.



Core Responsibility: Deep Data Analysis

The primary responsibility of this role is analyzing large datasets related to lead generation and inbound call performance.

Your job is not simply compiling reports. Your job is to investigate the data, identify patterns, and explain what is happening and why.



Our systems generate large volumes of operational data every day. You will analyze this data to identify trends, detect anomalies, and uncover opportunities to improve performance.



Your work will directly influence how the company:

• Allocates marketing budgets

• Evaluates traffic sources and partners

• Identifies profitable campaigns

• Detects operational issues

• Improves overall lead quality and conversion performance



What “Digging Into the Data” Means

A large part of this role involves investigating performance changes and answering business questions using data.

Examples include:

• Why did lead volume drop in a specific campaign?

• Which traffic sources generate the highest quality calls?

• Which campaigns produce the highest revenue per lead?

• Why did conversion rates decline for a specific buyer?

• Which campaigns are producing the highest margins?

• Are there anomalies or irregular patterns in the data?



You will analyze raw data and translate it into clear explanations and insights for management.

Your role is to turn large amounts of operational data into meaningful business intelligence.



Types of Data You Will Work With

You will regularly analyze datasets that include:

• Lead generation performance data

• Call tracking and call duration data

• Campaign and traffic source performance

• Revenue and conversion data

• Buyer performance metrics

• Cost-per-lead and profitability metrics

• Operational performance reports



This data comes from multiple platforms and systems, and part of your role will be organizing and combining these datasets to produce meaningful analysis.



Key Responsibilities

Lead & Call Data Analysis

• Analyze large datasets related to lead generation and inbound calls

• Identify trends, patterns, and performance shifts

• Detect anomalies and investigate unusual data behavior

• Compare performance across campaigns, traffic sources, and buyers

• Evaluate profitability and performance metrics

• Provide insights to improve campaign efficiency and revenue



Reporting & Insights

• Create structured performance reports for leadership

• Build dashboards and analysis tools in Excel or Google Sheets

• Summarize trends and explain performance changes

• Present clear insights based on data findings



Data Investigation & Validation

• Investigate discrepancies between systems or reports

• Validate accuracy of lead and call reporting data

• Identify potential reporting issues or data inconsistencies

• Conduct deeper investigations when unusual performance changes occur



Requirements

We are specifically looking for someone with strong analytical ability and real experience working with data.

Required:

• 2+ years of experience in data analysis, marketing analytics, or operational analytics

• Strong ability to analyze large datasets

• Advanced Excel or Google Sheets skills

• Strong understanding of trend analysis and data interpretation

• Strong attention to detail

• Strong written English communication skills

• Comfortable working with numbers and data every day



Strongly Preferred

• Experience analyzing marketing or lead generation data

• Experience analyzing call center or call tracking data

• Experience with SQL or database querying

• Experience using data visualization tools (Tableau, Power BI, Looker, etc.)

• Experience working with performance marketing or lead generation companies



What We Offer

• Long-term stable position

• Competitive pay based on experience

• Performance-based raises

• Direct collaboration with company leadership

• Opportunity to grow into a Senior Data Analyst or Analytics Lead role



We are building a highly data-driven organization, and this role will play an important part in improving how we analyze and optimize performance.



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

Your resume

A short paragraph describing your data analysis experience

A short paragraph describing the largest dataset you have worked with

The word “Insights” in the first line of your application (to confirm attention to detail)



If you enjoy digging into complex datasets, identifying patterns, and uncovering insights that improve business performance, we would love to hear from you.



We are hiring immediately.
