title: Web Designer (High-End Interactive & Animation Focus)
description:
Web Designer (High-End Interactive & Animation Focus)



Adapting Social is a design, marketing, and creative agency fueled by entrepreneurial spirit and ambition. We are building a culture of the industry’s brightest talent while creating a fun, hardworking, and collaborative environment. We are the ultimate resource for our clients, offering SEM/PPC, Web Design, Graphic Design, Social Media Management, Copywriting + Blogging,
 Marketing, Photography, and Videography.



As we continue to grow our team, clientele, and company, we recognize that our success comes directly from talented individuals who thrive in a collaborative environment and push creative boundaries.



Our mission is to save, support, and serve small businesses around the world while cultivating a culture that allows our team to be creative, innovative, and inspired.



Job Description



Adapting Social is seeking a highly creative, design-forward Web Designer who is passionate about building visually striking, interactive, and modern websites that stand out.



We are specifically looking for designers who go beyond template-style websites and have the ability to create dynamic, visually engaging experiences through layout, motion, animations, and strong visual storytelling.



The ideal candidate has a strong eye for design, understands user experience, and can craft websites that feel premium, polished, and memorable. You should be excited about experimenting with layouts, subtle motion, and micro-interactions that elevate the experience and make a site feel modern and high-end.



We’re looking for someone whose portfolio includes bold, creative, or interactive websites that truly stand out — not just functional builds.



This role will work closely with the Web Manager and collaborate with designers, developers, and marketing strategists to bring client brands to life online.



This position reports directly to the Web Manager.





The ideal candidate:

Has a portfolio with visually impressive, modern, and interactive websites

Is passionate about creative layouts, motion design, and animations

Understands how to balance design aesthetics with conversion-focused UX

Can build websites that feel unique, polished, and intentionally designed

Thinks beyond templates and enjoys pushing creative boundaries

Is curious about emerging web trends and technologies

Is detail-oriented and collaborative

If your work includes creative layouts, smooth animations, micro-interactions, and modern UI design, we want to see it.



Desired Skill Set

Strong understanding of modern web design principles

HTML and CSS knowledge

WordPress experience

Wix/Wix Studio experience

Elementor Page Builder experience

Responsive and interaction design

UI/UX best practices

Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)

Branding, color theory, and typography

Experience creating animated or interactive elements

Design tools such as Figma, Photoshop, or Illustrator

Understanding of accessibility standards and performance optimization



Bonus if you have experience with:

Advanced animations or motion design

Scroll-based interactions

Micro-interactions and dynamic UI behaviors

High-end or award-style web design inspiration

Webflow experience



Responsibilities

Design visually engaging, modern, and conversion-focused websites for clients across multiple industries

Create dynamic layouts and engaging user experiences that go beyond standard template structures

Incorporate animations, motion design, and interactive elements to enhance the user experience

Collaborate with the Web Manager and Web Designers from concept to launch

Work alongside marketing teams to ensure design supports campaign goals

Deliver high-quality design work while balancing multiple projects

Stay up to date with the latest web design trends, tools, and creative approaches

Contribute creative ideas that elevate the visual direction of projects



Requirements

2+ years of agency or startup experience

Strong conceptual and creative thinking

Demonstrated experience designing modern websites

A strong eye for visual composition and layout

Ability to balance creativity with usability and conversion goals

Excellent communication and collaboration skills

Ability to receive feedback and iterate quickly

Highly adaptable and organized

Must provide a portfolio showcasing standout web design work



Important:

We are specifically looking for portfolios that include visually impressive, modern, or interactive websites. Applicants who only provide basic or template-style designs may not be considered.





Equal Opportunity Statement



This description has been designed to indicate the general nature and level of work performed by employees within this position. The actual duties, responsibilities, and qualifications may vary based on assignment or group.



We believe that diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging are fundamental, which is why we’re building a company that leads the way.  to create reels.

-Social Media posts would need to be created

I'm looking for someone with experience in video content creation (dealing with AI, such as 
) and strong photo editing history.

title: Licensed CPA
description:
About Tax Savvy

Tax Savvy is a U.S.-based tax and business advisory firm helping entrepreneurs legally reduce taxes while staying compliant and well-documented. We combine proactive tax planning, accurate bookkeeping, and strategic advisory so business owners can reinvest profits and grow with confidence.

We value clarity, integrity, documentation, and collaboration. Our team works closely together, respects each other’s time, and takes pride in high-quality work.



About the Role

We are seeking a detail-oriented Accounting Professional to support our U.S.-based CPA and advisory team. This role is highly focused on strategic growth in different phases of engagement. Primarily Reviewing previous Tax & Accounting records, identifying errors and missed opportunities; Correcting errors, cleaning up books and preparing taxes for previous years; managing and providing proactive support with a limited number of clients, catering to developing good rapport with the same clients. You will become familiar with Tax Dome, our CRM for communication, organization, and processes. 

You must also be proficient in QuickBooks Online bookkeeping, financial reporting, reviewing &/or maintaining clean, compliant records that support advanced tax strategies.

You will work within a team, maintain a workflow & fulfill tasks within SOP's directed by an Operations Manager/Executive Assistant & other bookkeepers.





Primary Responsibilities

- knowledge of IRS regulations, and willingness to learn industry-specific expertise (Dental, Medical, other licensed professional/owner type businesses) 

- Be passionate about accomplishing tasks thoroughly and on time.

- Review Accounting within Quickbooks Online, Xero and other accounting software or bank statements

- Perform Tax & Financial Analysis and Audits when onboarding clients

- Work with Operations Manager to create jobs and tasks to clean up taxes & accounting

- Work with Operations Manager to transition new clients into a workflow with tasks to be completed by bookkeeper and or yourself.

- Proficient in written and spoken English

- Work as a member of a team

- Financial Analysis & Audits 

- In depth knowledge of QuickBooks Online

- Ability to proficiently review P & L's

- Reconcile accounts and identify discrepancies

- Maintain clean, audit-ready books

- Deliver books ready for US Tax Preparer/CPA

- Ensure bookkeeping aligns with tax strategies and compliance requirements

- Financial Reporting

- Prepare monthly financial reports for clients

- Prepare quarterly financial reports, including tax projections

- Ensure reports are accurate, timely, and clearly presented

- Advisory & Team Support

- Work with the founder and business managers to:

- Review financials prior to quarterly or annual client calls

- Discuss growth insights and financial trends

- Support tax planning by ensuring numbers are reliable and well-documented

- Client Communication Support

- Join client calls when needed or review recorded client communications to understand expectations

- Apply instructions accurately and ask clarifying questions when necessary

- Documentation & CRM Management

- Maintain detailed, clear notes in CRM, TaxDome

- Update tasks, client records, and statuses consistently

- Help keep the CRM clean and usable across the team



Required Qualifications

- Licensed CPA, US Tax Preparation (not necessarily filing) experience

- Strong familiarity in using CRM's and internal documentation

- Minimum 5 years of experience with QuickBooks Online

- Excellent written English skills

- Strong understanding of accounting and financial terminology

- High attention to detail and accuracy



Relevant Certifications (Optional but advantageous):

- Enrolled Agent (EA): Specialized expertise in IRS representation.

- Certified Internal Auditor (CIA): Strong background in internal controls.

- Certified Information Systems Auditor (CISA): Expertise in financial systems. 



Ideal DISC Profile

This role is best suited for candidates with a Cd or CD DISC profile:

High C (Conscientiousness): Accuracy, compliance, documentation, attention to detail

High D (Dominance): On time, Responsive, independent, Takes pride in meeting deadlines and respond quickly to client needs.





Tools You’ll Use

- TaxDome

- QuickBooks Online

- Google Suite

- Notion

- Clickup

- Slack



Compensation & Growth

20+ hours per week - full time for the right candidate

Compensation based upon experience, speed and accuracy, ability to work within the team structure, pursuit of individual excellence while providing growth within the company



How to Apply

When applying, please include:

Your resume or CV

A short summary of your experience working as a US Tax Accountant/CPA

Your DISC profile (if available) or confirmation you align with Cdi /CD

The word “BOOKS” in your response to confirm you read the full job posting

Applications without the word BOOKS will not be reviewed.



Final Note

Our firm is in a significant growth phase. We need someone who is ready to work part time 20 hours now, and be able to work full time in the very near future. If you value precision, documentation, and being part of a team that cares about you as an individual as much as a job well done, we would love to hear from you.

title: Real Estate Assistant
description:
Who We Need



Are you an ethical, reliable, and committed person who shows up on time every day with a positive attitude and a real willingness to learn? If you can be fully present from 9:30am to 6:00pm EST, Monday to Saturday, with a proper 30 minute break each day, I can teach you everything you need to succeed in this role.



You will be taking over from a long term assistant, so you must be comfortable learning existing systems and working closely with my real estate partners, vendors, and technology tools. You must have your own reliable laptop and fast, stable internet, and you cannot have other jobs, classes, or commitments during our working hours so you can stay fully focused on this role.



I am a real estate broker in Canada looking for a long term Real Estate & Marketing Assistant to support transactions, listings, clients, and social media. I’m a respectful, polite boss who values honesty and communication, and I genuinely enjoy helping my team grow their skills and confidence over time.





What You’ll Do



- Prepare, review, and organize contracts, agreements, and disclosures, and track all condition deadlines (financing, inspection, status certificates, etc.).  

- Assist with offers, amendments, and notices of fulfillment, and ensure all documents are properly signed and stored.  

- Coordinate with clients, lawyers, lenders, and agents to help ensure smooth closings, and run market analyses and comparables when needed.  

- Schedule showings and inspections, answer client inquiries, provide updates, and keep the CRM and databases organized and up to date.  

- Set up MLS property searches, help qualify tenants for landlords, and qualify listings for buyer clients.  

- List properties for lease and sale on MLS and other platforms, prepare and post property details and descriptions, and coordinate photography, staging, and virtual tours.  

- Create and manage social media posts, flyers, newsletters, and promotional materials, and help manage campaigns across
, Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube.  

- Maintain client engagement through digital channels and help update website content and listing campaigns.  

- Manage
s and correspondence, organize files, contracts, and records, and track expenses and invoices related to transactions when requested.  

- Support post closing tasks such as ensuring paperwork is archived, utility transfer
s, key handover coordination, and occasional follow ups, newsletters, and welcome
s.  

- Attend regular Teams/Zoom/Whatsapp video calls and meetings and training with clients, partners, vendors, as needed.





Tools We Use



- TRREB MLS (Matrix)  

- Follow Up Boss CRM  

- Microsoft 365 (Outlook, OneDrive, Word, Excel)  

- Canva (for graphics and presentations)  

- ChatGPT and Perplexity (for research and drafting)  

- Social media:
, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube  





What You’ll Get



- Stable, long term full, time role with a growing real estate business  

- Clear schedule: 9:30am to 6:00pm EST, Monday to Saturday  

- Starting salary: PHP 25,000 per month during a 3 month probationary period, increasing to PHP 30,000 per month after successful completion  

- 13th month / Christmas bonus, with potential additional performance based bonuses over time  





How to Apply



Send a brief non AI message with:  

   - A short introduction about yourself  

   - Your relevant work experience  

   - Why this role interests you and why you’re a good fit  

   - Your current internet speed and computer specs

title: Accountant/Bookkeeper for CFO Firm
description:
Are you a master at reconciling tough balance sheet accounts?

Do you know QuickBooks Online like the back of your hand?

Can you work East Coast hours, 9am–5pm, Monday through Friday?



If so, you may be a great fit and will enjoy working with us.



Read Before Applying

Working hours are non-negotiable: Monday–Friday through 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET

Resume link required (Google Drive or Dropbox)

This role requires real accrual-based accounting, not cash-basis categorization

If your experience does not include understanding balance sheet flow, this role is not a fit.



What You Must Already Have

Daily QuickBooks Online experience

Applied accrual accounting experience

Strong balance sheet reconciliation skills

Payroll journal entries (wages, taxes, accruals)

Monthly bank and credit card reconciliations

Clear understanding of COGS vs operating expenses

Experience supporting multiple clients in a firm environment

5+ years accounting or bookkeeping experience

Reliable, high-speed internet



The Role

We are a U.S.-based fractional CFO firm supporting service-based businesses.

This is a detail-driven accounting role supporting CFO review and decision-making. Accuracy matters more than speed. This is not a training position.



Core Responsibilities

Maintain clean, accrual-based books in QuickBooks Online

Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations

Record and review payroll journal entries

Maintain a clean, consistent chart of accounts

Proactively flag issues or unclear transactions

Prepare reliable financials for CFO review

Support month-end close and client deadlines



How to Apply



Submit:



A resume link (Google Drive or Dropbox)

Written confirmation that you can consistently work through 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET

Confirm you have at least 5 years US accounting experience 



Applications missing this info will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media Manager - Skydiving/ USA
description:
Social Media Manager — Skydiving Brand

(TikTok + Instagram +
 + Google)



We run a skydiving operation in the US. Our brand is energetic, warm, and celebratory. We're the market leader in our region and we take social media seriously. We need a part-time social media manager to execute our content calendar across TikTok, Instagram,
, and Google Business Profile. You'll receive raw footage, a photo database, a content calendar, and brand guidelines. Your job is to edit, schedule, and publish content that feels native to each platform every day.

3–4
 posts per week

1 YouTube upload per week

Schedule everything via Hootsuite or similar app

WhatsApp communication with your company contact for approvals before posting



You're a Fit If You:



Have managed brand accounts on TikTok, Instagram, Google and

Edit short-form video and know the difference between what works on TikTok vs. Instagram

Software: CapCut or similar, Canva, any scheduling tools, Meta Business Suite, Google Business Profile. Bonus: Adobe Suite.

How We Hire — 5 Steps

title: Video Editor

 ads, TikTok creatives, branded product explainers) and can take raw concepts or scripts and turn them into scroll-stopping videos.



Responsibilities

, TikTok, and Instagram.



Create VSLs (Video Sales Letters) that highlight product benefits and drive conversions.



Source stock footage, UGC-style clips, and b-roll from high-quality platforms.



Use AI tools (where appropriate) to generate supporting visuals or voiceovers.



Research and take inspiration from top-performing e-commerce health/wellness ads.



Add captions, motion graphics, and branding to keep videos polished and on-brand.



Work closely with the marketing team to test multiple variations and optimize performance.



Requirements



Proven experience editing e-commerce ads or branded product videos.



Strong portfolio showing health/wellness, fitness, or lifestyle product ads.



Ability to source high-quality stock footage & music.



Knowledge of direct-response ad structure (problem ? solution ? product ? CTA).



Familiarity with platform specs (ratios, length, compliance for FB/TikTok/IG).



Skilled with tools like Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, or AI video editors.



Creative eye, attention to detail, and ability to meet deadlines.



Nice to Have



Experience editing AI-enhanced content (voiceovers, avatars, captions).



Familiarity with the health & wellness niche.



Understanding of performance metrics (CTR, ROAS, engagement) to refine creatives.



What We Offer



Project-based pay to start, with consistent work once we restock and scale campaigns.



Competitive compensation based on experience and output.



Growth opportunities into lead editor role as our brand expands.



How to Apply



Please send us:



A short introduction (2–3 sentences about your editing style/experience).



Portfolio or links to e-commerce product ads you’ve created (health/wellness niche preferred).



Your typical turnaround time for a 30–60s ad creative.



Your rate (per video or hourly).



Answers to these screening questions:



What is your process for creating a high-converting e-commerce ad from scratch?



How do you source stock/UGC footage for products?



Which editing tools/AI platforms are you comfortable with?



Share 1 health/wellness ad you admire  what makes it effective?



If given a script for a product in the health niche, how would you structure a VSL?
salary: 7-10 usd per minute of video ad

title: Funding Coordinator Assistant (Remote – Alternative Lending
description:
About Us



We’re a fast-growing alternative lending company helping entrepreneurs and business owners secure the capital they need — from personal term loans and business credit cards to SBA products, equipment funding, and business credit lines.



Our team moves fast. We help clients through every stage of the funding process — from pre-qualification to approval — and pride ourselves on providing white-glove service that makes financing feel simple.



The Challenge



The hard part in lending isn’t selling the money — it’s fulfilling it.

Our Funding Coordinator is managing a heavy pipeline — chasing documents, packaging applications, submitting to lenders, and tracking approvals.



That’s where you come in.



The Role: Funding Coordinator Assistant



You’ll be the right hand to our senior Funding Coordinator — helping keep deals organized, documents collected, and clients informed.

Your job is to make sure every file moves smoothly from “application” to “funded.”



Note: You may do all or part of these responsibilities depending on workflow, volume, and your skill set.



Your daily responsibilities:



Follow up with clients for missing documents (bank statements, tax returns, IDs, etc.)



Upload and organize documents in Google Drive and our CRM (GoHighLevel)



Maintain trackers and spreadsheets with deal status, lender, and progress notes



Communicate with clients via
, text, and Slack for updates and reminders



Prepare lender submission packets under guidance from the Funding Coordinator



Create daily progress reports on active files and pending docs



Assist in credit optimization — helping clients prepare for funding by:



Reviewing personal and business credit profiles



Tracking action plans to improve credit scores and utilization



Keeping clients accountable to paydowns, tradeline additions, and monitoring goals



Ensure clients always feel informed, supported, and confident throughout the process



Who You Are



Extremely organized — you love checklists and keeping multiple projects on track



Strong communicator — professional, clear, and concise in English



Detail-oriented — accuracy matters to you



Tech-savvy — comfortable with CRMs (GoHighLevel), Google Drive, and Slack



Reliable and proactive — you take initiative and follow through



Experience in lending, banking, credit repair, or financial services is a strong plus



What’s In It for You



Fully remote role with a growing U.S.-based company



Pay: $4–$6/hr USD (depending on experience)



Performance bonuses tied to deals funded



Work directly with experienced funding professionals



Learn the inside playbook of credit and business lending



Clear growth path to Client Success Manager or Funding Coordinator as we scale



How to Apply



Send your:



Resume



Short video or Loom (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you’d be a great fit



Your internet speed test and available working hours (in EST)

title: Cold Email Specialist - Instantly.AI
description:
GDG Media Management is seeking a Cold
 Specialist with strong B2B outbound experience to manage and scale cold
 campaigns across multiple industries.



This role is responsible for building targeted audiences, developing high-performing
 copy, and managing outbound campaigns inside Instantly.AI to generate qualified meetings for our clients.



We are looking for someone who already understands outbound marketing and cold
 systems, not someone learning from scratch.

title: Supply Chain Assistant (Remote- Philippines)
description:
Title: Supply Chain Assistant (Remote- Philippines)

Engagement: Full-time External Contractor

Monthly Contractor Fee: $900- $1200 per month depending on experience 



About LullaBellz

LullaBellz is the UK’s number one online retailer for premium fibre hair extensions. We are an established, award-winning e-commerce brand with a strong focus on quality and innovative product design. LullaBellz is committed to empowering customers to express their style with confidence through accessible, fashion-forward hair solutions.

Role 



We are looking for a Philippines-based remote Supply Chain Assistant to be an integral part of the buying and Merchandising department. The contractor will be assisting in identifying and maximising opportunities within the supply chain. The work will contribute to the maintenance and exploration of supply and service contacts with ownership on data reads and outreach. 

As Supply Chain Assistant you will focus on identifying obstacles and opportunities to maximise profitability in addition to healthy stock turnover. A key focus on cost savings, quality, ways of working and communication whilst growing a diverse supply base and range for the long-term buying strategy. 



Key Responsibilities 

•	Ownership of outreach and management of the contacts database

•	Daily communication and records kept to establish statuses and next steps for multiple areas 

•	Identifying areas of improvement and opportunity, providing summaries and proposals to progress these with Buying 

Manager support

•	Product specification documentation and sample briefs, leading to sample and colour matching reviews

•	Refining a broad outreach supply base down to 5 using clear rationale and explaining workings

•	Maintenance of stock intake, position and sales reporting, utilising these to create a master inventory health report 

•	Ownership of live SKU margin dashboard 

•	Ongoing overviews of margin erosion risks and identifying cost saving opportunities 

•	Landed cost calculator document updates and maintenance

•	Potential for travel depending on role requirements



Skills

• Prior experience in supply chain operations

• Strong communication skills to work with suppliers and external partners in the UK and China

• A keen interest and commercial awareness of the Hair and Beauty industry

• Advanced MS Excel (pivot tables, lookups, formula, margin calcs, dashboards) Skills to analyse data and process numerical information, highlighting trends or issues and recommending appropriate actions

• Experience with setting up MS Excel reports, confidence in mid to advanced level formulas and data analysis

• Comfortable with a growing company and fast-paced environment, meeting deadlines whilst maintaining attention to detail is paramount

• Highly organised with excellent attention to detail

• Able to work independently while supporting a wider team.

• Experience within a Buying or Merchandising department is beneficial

Additional details  

• Suggested Hours: 40 hours/week | 1pm – 9pm PH Time 

• The contractor must own their PC or Mac with Full HD resolution and a reliable high-speed internet connection. 



Application



Please send your CV and a 60 second video explaining why you think you'd be a good fit for the contractor role. You can send this information in a message through the onlinejobs portal and attach a Loom for your 60 second video. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a Zoom interview.

title: Amazon Account Manger
description:
Growster is hiring a precision-driven Amazon Account Manager who can own the operational backbone of our brands - from flat-file uploads to account health and performance reporting.



If you love structure, thrive in detailed work, and enjoy keeping Amazon accounts running like clockwork, this role is for you.

We’re a boutique Amazon growth agency founded by ex-aggregator brand owners who scale 7- and 8-figure brands across the EU & US. Our mission: manage every account like we’re co-founders of the brand.



Who You Are



You’re not just an “account manager” - you’re a system-thinker with a deep understanding of Amazon’s operational landscape.

You’re fluent in Seller Central, flat-files, and case management.

You take pride in accuracy, organization, and process discipline.

You’re comfortable solving complex problems with Amazon Support.

You can juggle multiple accounts, tasks, and deadlines without losing precision.

You’re proactive - spotting small issues before they become big ones.



What You’ll Do



Own all daily operational workflows across assigned Amazon accounts.

Manage flat-file uploads - create, troubleshoot, and fix listing issues (parent/child relations, variations, attributes, suppressed listings).

Maintain account health - handle listing suppressions, stranded inventory, and compliance notifications with Amazon Support.

Plan and track inventory - ensure correct FBA replenishment, inbound shipments, and restock limits.

Execute catalog updates - titles, bullets, A+ modules, and backend optimizations.

Communicate with clients through clear weekly updates and monthly reports.

Collaborate with internal teams (PPC, design, and strategy) to align operational actions with growth goals.

Build and maintain SOPs to make recurring processes faster and more reliable.



What You Bring



2 + years experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts.

Strong knowledge of flat-file templates, listing reinstatement, and case escalation.

High attention to detail - you double-check everything before hitting “Submit.”

Strong written English; confident communicator with clients and Amazon reps.

Proficiency with Google Sheets (lookup formulas, conditional formatting, pivot tables).

Experience preparing Sellerboard / Helium 10 or manual reports preferred.

Experience with inventory forecasting.

Experience creating optimised SEO Listing

Proficiency with developing briefings and suggesting content optimisations (Main & Secondary Images, A+) to drive CVR improvements



Why Work With Growster



At Growster, growth is our DNA - for our clients and our team.

We combine a startup mindset with professional execution, working with ambitious brands across Europe and the U.S.



We offer:



Fully Remote Work – run your day from anywhere.

Flexible Time Management – we trust you to deliver results, not just hours.

Ongoing Learning – access training, SOPs, and mentorship from experienced brand operators.

title: Senior Account Growth Specialist (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Who We Are – Growster



We are Growster – a full-service Amazon growth partner founded by 3 ex-Aggregators and Brand Owners. Our leadership team has scaled thousands of ASINs, including single products generating 8-figure revenues.



We’re boutique in size but compete on performance: sharp strategy, lean execution, and growth-focused fees. We operate like co-founders to our clients — owning their growth as if it were our own.



At Growster, growth is our DNA. We grow brands, and we grow the people behind them.



Who We’re Looking For – (No Average Account Managers)

We’re hiring a Senior Account Growth Specialist who can run brands like an owner. You won’t just “manage accounts” — you’ll own them end-to-end.

This role is for someone who understands exactly how to scale a brand on Amazon:

- Building products with clear product-market fit

- Positioning them against competition

- Optimizing every lever — from content to ads to inventory — to maximize potential



We need someone who can:

- Think like a strategic co-founder

- Advise clients at C-level with confidence

- Lead PPC managers top-line (without micromanaging)

- Fight for account health and compliance as if it were their own brand



If you’ve just “touched Amazon,” this isn’t for you. If you’ve owned 7–8 figure portfolios and can prove it, keep reading.

Your Role

- Oversee PPC strategies in collaboration with PPC managers (SP, SB, SD)

- Ensure flawless inventory planning & stock management

- Launch and expand new products with precision (flat files, compliance, positioning)

- Rigorously safeguard account health — case follow-ups, escalation, problem-solving

- Deliver strategic growth roadmaps and advise clients directly

- Lead and mentor PPC managers + junior tea
mbers on execution excellence



What You Bring

3+ years of Amazon account management with proven case studies (must include multi-6/7/8 figure growth examples)

Top 1% skill set in:

- SEO + keyword strategy

- High-CTR & CVR content (listings, A+, images)

- Data-driven product positioning in competitive markets

- Strong tools background: Sellerboard, Helium10, DataDive, Brand Analytics, Excel

- Deep understanding of inventory, pricing, and profitability optimization

- Strategic advisor mindset: entrepreneurial, proactive, decisive

- Excellent English communication skills (client-facing role)



Why Growster?

- Manage multi-8 figure portfolios across global marketplaces

- Work directly with ex-Aggregators who’ve scaled 1000s of ASINs

- Exposure to top international brands and advanced strategies

- Lean, startup-like culture: fast-moving, no politics, high-impact

- Career path to Head of Account Growth ? Director of Strategy

- Shape the future of our account management department



At Growster, you’re not an “account manager” — you’re a growth partner trusted with building brands into 8–9 figure successes.

title: Job Opportunity: Media Buyer for E-Commerce Dropshipping Store
description:
Job Opportunity: Media Buyer for E-Commerce Dropshipping 



Are you experienced in setting up advertising campaigns for e-commerce or dropshipping stores? Do you know how to correctly structure campaigns inside ad platforms and follow clear instructions to launch ads efficiently? If so, I’m looking for someone like you to join my team for the long term.



What the Job Entails:



As a Media Buyer, your role will be focused only on creating and publishing advertising campaigns based on clear instructions. You will receive a detailed sheet containing all the information needed for the campaigns.



Your tasks will include:



Setting up advertising campaigns based on the instructions provided in a sheet.



Uploading the correct creatives, copy, targeting, and campaign settings exactly as instructed.



Publishing approximately 3 campaigns per day.



Making sure campaigns are created correctly and go live without errors.



Following the campaign structure exactly as explained in the provided guidelines.



Responding quickly if adjustments or new ads need to be launched.



The role is very structured — you will simply follow the sheet and set up the campaigns inside the ad platform.



What I’m Looking For:



Experience with ad platforms such as Meta Ads Manager 
/Instagram)



Strong attention to detail and ability to follow instructions carefully.



Basic understanding of how to set up campaigns, ad sets, and ads.



Strong written and spoken English skills.



You must be available every day for at least 1 hour.



You must be able to respond quickly and be flexible when campaigns need to be published or adjusted.



Ability to work independently and complete tasks reliably.



What You Can Expect:



Around 1 hour of work per day to start, with the possibility of more work as the business grows.



Clear instructions and a detailed sheet with all the information needed to create the campaigns.



A simple and structured workflow.



A supportive and growing work environment.



If you already know how to set up ad campaigns and can follow instructions accurately, respond quickly, and work consistently every day, I’d love to hear from you. Let’s build something great together.

title: HR Coordinator
description:
About us:



EIG Property Management is based in Minneapolis, MN, USA. We manage over 1,400 apartment rental units in the Twin Cities. We are seeking a full-time permanent remote HR Coordinator. The role is approximately 40 hours per week, but could be as low as 35 hours in the low season and 45 hours in the high season.  The hours are Monday to Friday, approximately 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM US Central.  We are not looking for an agency or someone working another job during our business hours.  

 

 ? Human Resources Management 

? Talent Acquisition: Manage talent acquisition process, job postings, candidate interview scheduling & communications, onboarding and off-boarding procedures/checklist, training coordination, employee relations, policy implementation, compliance, and fostering a positive work environment. 

? Lead Human Resource Essential Functions (e.g., unemployment, corrective actions): Support HR processes, including unemployment claims processing, documentation preparation, compliance monitoring, and assisting with employee relations activities.

? Lead Onboarding and Offboarding: Facilitate employee onboarding and offboarding processes, including preparing documentation, coordinating training, managing equipment, and ensuring compliance with company policies. 

? Train Staff on Business Operations: Design, conduct, and document training sessions for staff on various company processes, systems, and best practices, fostering continuous professional development. 

? Coordinate Staff Performance Reviews: Plan and coordinate our staff performance review process. Generate review templates. Communicate with staff and supervisors on the process and track progress. 



? Technology Administration 



? Administer Time Doctor: Oversee the utilization and maintenance of Time Doctor, managing user setup, compliance monitoring, report generation, troubleshooting, and ongoing staff training. 

? Administer Harvest: Maintain Harvest accounts for time-tracking and project management, including account creation, configuration, report generation, troubleshooting, and training users on best practices and policies. 

? Gather Information and Evaluate New Processes, Technologies, Systems: Research, analyze, and evaluate potential new technologies, systems, or processes that could improve operational efficiency or productivity, presenting findings and recommendations. 



Note: Please note that the responsibilities listed above are not exhaustive. Additional duties and responsibilities may be assigned based on business needs and the evolving requirements of the role. 



Job Requirements 



? Excellent English speaking and writing ability. 

? Technology Requirements: strong, consistent internet and electricity, 2 screens, 10-key on your keyboard, headset, and mouse. 

? As this is a work-from-home setup, you must have a quiet working environment anytime you are clocked in for work. 

? US Central Time hours as scheduled, generally an 8-10 hour day Monday to Friday between 8 AM and 5 PM 



Application Requirements

If you are interested in applying, please include the following in your job application submission:



1. A custom video recording. Please take 1 to 4 minutes to share why you are interested in the position, or a quick summary of your experience and qualifications.

2. Confirm that you will not be working another job at the same time as you're working this job.

3. A link to a PDF of your resume.

4. Confirmation that you plan to conduct the interview with the same quality of computer and equipment that you would bring to the job, including webcam, headset, strong computer. During the interview, you will need to be on video and you will need to share your desktop for a brief spreadsheet exercise.



If you are interested in the role, fill out the application form here -

title: Phone-First Customer Experience VA (US Company | Pacific Time)
description:
We’re hiring a confident, phone-savvy professional to become the first voice customers hear at Graham Landscape & Design.



This is not a back-office admin job.



This role is for someone who thrives in live conversations, builds instant trust, and can guide customers with clarity and warmth while managing systems at the same time. 



If you take pride in excellent communication and love helping customers feel taken care of, you will do very well here.



Your performance directly impacts customer experience, booked appointments, and company growth.



Primary Responsibility: Phone Excellence

Your #1 priority is handling incoming customer calls exceptionally well — every time. You will:

- Answer all inbound calls within 30 seconds using approved greeting scripts

- Handle calls via Dialpad with professionalism, clarity, and urgency

- Confidently guide callers through conversations

- Gather critical customer information accurately (Full name, Service address, Phone number, Service need)

- Determine whether the caller is a new customer, a previous or an existing customer, or a new owner of a serviced property

- Verify and update customer records in the CRM

- Book the first sales or service appointment during the call whenever possible

- Clearly explain next steps, expectations, and service policies (including drive-time billing when applicable)

- Handle missed calls by returning them within 30 minutes

- Leave clear, complete, and accurate call notes to ensure seamless handoff to sales or service teams

- Uphold Service Beyond Expectation on every single interaction



This role is accountable for call quality, lead accuracy, and appointment success — not just answering the phone.



Secondary Tasks (When Phones Are Quiet)

When call volume is low, you may assist with:

- Light CRM or QuickBooks data updates

- Appointment confirmations

- Calendar updates

- Follow-ups on missed calls or leads

- Administrative support from the Office Manager



Phone coverage always comes first.



Must-Have Qualifications

- Strong phone confidence and professional speaking voice

- Near-native English fluency (verbal and written)

- Reliable availability: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM US Pacific Time

- Ability to multitask systems while speaking with customers

- Calm, solutions-focused customer service mindset

- Strong attention to detail and documentation habits

- Comfortable explaining policies clearly and confidently

- Willingness to follow structured SOPs

- Comfortable using tools like ChatGPT for efficiency



Bonus (Not Required, But Valuable)

- Landscaping, construction, or home services experience

- Aspire CRM familiarity

- Appointment setting or scheduling experience

- Escalation handling experience

- SOP documentation experience



Compensation & Growth

- PHP 40,000/month base salary

- Pay increase opportunities based on performance and tenure

- Long-term stability with a growing company

- Opportunity to grow into expanded administrative or coordination roles



We value reliability, initiative, and accountability.



This Role Is NOT a Fit If

- You dislike live phone conversations

- You prefer quiet, independent back-office work

- You struggle with multitasking while speaking

- You are uncomfortable following structured processes

- You are not available in Pacific Time consistently



How to Apply (Follow Exactly):

Send one
 only to 



Subject: Phone VA – Your Full Name



Include:

1. Resume

2. 2-Minute Audio Recording (Google Drive link)

    * We use the audio recording so we can hear your communication style — since this is a phone-first role.

    * In the recording:

       - Introduce yourself

       - Explain why you are excellent on the phone

    * File name: FirstName_LastName_Audio

       - Incomplete or misformatted applications will not be reviewed.



Why Join Us

- Clear expectations and structured systems

- Direct impact on revenue and customer experience

- Stable long-term role

- Opportunity to grow as responsibilities expand



If you take pride in professional communication and want to be part of a company that values excellence, we’d love to meet you.

title: Animated Video Editor – YouTube & Shorts/Reels
description:
About Viral Vault Studios:

Viral Vault Studios is a digital content creation company dedicated to producing educational and entertaining videos on YouTube. Our mission is to make online learning fun and engaging by creating content that captivates and informs global audiences. We focus on high-quality faceless YouTube videos across niches like anime recaps, celebrity health, and more.



About the Role:

We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Animated Video Editor who can produce engaging animated content for YouTube and short-form platforms such as Shorts, Reels, and TikTok. You will transform scripts and voiceovers into visually compelling videos using motion graphics, text animation, and visual storytelling techniques.



What You’ll Do:

- Edit and produce animated videos for YouTube long-form and short-form vertical content

- Turn scripts and voiceovers into dynamic visual stories

- Create motion graphics, character or 2D animations, text animations, transitions, and visual effects

- Design engaging hooks and fast-paced intros optimized for viewer retention

- Adapt content into multiple formats (16:9, 9:16, 1:1)

- Collaborate with scriptwriters and content managers on creative direction

- Source royalty-free assets (images, music, SFX) when needed

- Meet production deadlines and manage multiple projects simultaneously

- Stay updated with editing trends used by top YouTube and short-form creators



Qualifications:

- Proven experience as an animated video editor or motion graphics editor

- Strong familiarity with YouTube content style and Shorts/Reels editing

- Proficiency in tools such as: After Effects, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve or animation tools such as Blender, Toon Boom, Moho, CapCut, etc.

- Ability to create fast-paced, high-retention edits

- Strong sense of timing, pacing, and visual storytelling

- Ability to work with AI or human voiceovers

- Portfolio or demo reel required



Nice to Have:

- Experience editing faceless YouTube channels

- Knowledge of kinetic typography

- Basic illustration or graphic design skills

- Familiarity with YouTube analytics and audience retention trends

- Experience with templates and asset libraries



If interested in applying, please submit a sample video reel on any sport-related topic and also attach an accessible link to your resume in the
. Please put as subject title "Applying for Animated Video Editor"

description:
Job Overview



We are looking for a Paid Ads Specialist to plan, manage, and optimize paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms, with strong experience in Reddit Ads. The ideal candidate also has hands-on experience with Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads and understands performance marketing, conversion tracking, and ROI optimization.

This role requires someone who is data-driven, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple campaigns while continuously improving performance.



Key Responsibilities

-Plan, launch, and manage paid advertising campaigns, with a strong focus on Reddit Ads

-Manage campaigns on Google Ads, Meta Ads 
 and Instagram), and LinkedIn Ads

-Write ad copy and collaborate with designers for effective ad creatives

-Manage and optimize ad budgets to maximize ROI

-Prepare weekly and monthly campaign performance reports

-Identify opportunities to scale campaigns and improve results

-Experience with Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads

-Strong understanding of performance marketing and conversion tracking

-Experience with Google Analytics (GA4) and Google Tag Manager

-Strong analytical and reporting skills

-Highly organized and detail-oriented

Computer: Intel i5 processor (or better) with at least 8GB RAM

Equipment: Webcam, microphone, and headset or speakers

Internet: Minimum 100 Mbps stable connection with a backup internet source



WORK SCHEDULE & LOCATION

Schedule: Tuesday–Saturday, 12:00 AM–8:30 AM Manila Time

Long-term and stable position

Competitive pay

Work-from-home setup promoting work-life balance

Supportive remote work environment using Google Meet and time tracking tools

Collaborative team culture with strong growth opportunities

title: Lead Video Editor for Ecommerce
description:
READ ALL TO APPLY – APPLICATIONS ARE ONLY CONSIDERED WHEN SUBMITTED THROUGH THE FORM AT THE END.



Are you someone who THRIVES on AMBITION, LEADERSHIP, and CREATIVE STRATEGY?



Do you get excited by the idea of leading a high-performance team while still being hands-on with cutting-edge e-commerce ad creatives?



If you’re nodding with a big “ABSOLUTELY!”, then keep reading. This might be the opportunity you’ve been waiting for.



We’re a young and ambitious e-commerce brand on a mission to improve the lives of women over 60 through thoughtful, high-quality products designed specifically for them.



We’re searching for a Lead Video Editor to oversee and elevate our creative production. 



Your role? A balance of hands-on editing (with a specialty in
 Ads and direct-response e-commerce content) and team leadership, managing and mentoring other editors to consistently deliver thumb-stopping, emotionally charged, sales-driven videos.



You’ll play a critical role in shaping the visual voice of our brand, ensuring every video not only captures attention but also drives conversions.



We’re aiming to build an 8-figure brand within the next 12 months, and we need a growth-minded A-player who thrives at the intersection of creativity, speed, and leadership.



What We’re Looking For



We’re not just hiring for skills, we’re building a team based on shared values:



Honesty & Transparency: No sugarcoating. Truth builds trust.

Speed Over Comfort: We move fast. Execution speed is as critical as quality.

Relentless Improvement: You raise the bar daily, for yourself and your team.

Independent Thinking: You solve problems, think ahead, and innovate.

Ownership Mentality: Wins and mistakes alike, your team owns the outcome.



What You’ll Be Doing



- Hands-On Editing: Craft high-performing
 ads, UGC-style content, and VSLs that grab attention and convert.

- Team Leadership: Manage and mentor a growing team of video editors, providing clear feedback and elevating the creative output.

- Creative Direction: Collaborate with marketing, copywriting, and design teams to ensure alignment and strategy.

- Trendspotting: Stay ahead of the latest e-commerce creative trends to keep our content fresh and competitive.

- Workflow & Systems: Optimize editing pipelines for speed, quality, and scalability.

- Performance Tracking: Review data and results, using performance feedback to guide creative iterations.



What You’ll Need to Bring



- Proven experience editing direct-response video ads for e-commerce brands (especially
 ads)

- Strong experience with long-form VSL editing and short-form social content

- Demonstrated ability to lead, train, and manage a team of editors

- A strategic creative eye with understanding of direct-response marketing and e-commerce funnels

- Ability to manage multiple projects and hit deadlines in a fast-paced environment

- Excellent communication and leadership skills



A growth-driven mindset. You’re not just looking for a job, you’re building a career.



What’s In It For You



High salary plus performance-based bonuses.

Up to 40 hours per week, Monday through Saturday.

The chance to be a key leader in a fast-growing brand, with your work shaping campaigns seen worldwide.

A high-growth career path with room to scale your responsibilities as the brand grows.



How to Apply



Applications will only be considered if submitted through this form: 



Applications sent via OnlineJobs,
, or any other channel will be ignored.

title: Personal Career Assistant (Job Search & Ghost Applying) – $100+ BONUS
description:
I am looking for a highly motivated Virtual Assistant to help me land a Remote, Non-Voice (No-Talking) Job. Your primary task is to find high-quality job leads, customize my resume, and apply for me until I am hired.



Compensation:



Base Pay: $5.00 hour (DOE). 4 hrs a day.



SUCCESS BONUS: I will pay a $150.00 USD Bonus once I successfully sign a contract with a company you applied for.



Your Responsibilities:



Lead Sourcing: Identify 10–15 "Non-Voice" remote jobs daily (Data Entry, Chat Support,
/Zendesk, Content Moderation).



Application Management: Use my LinkedIn, Indeed, and glassdoor accounts to apply.



Resume Optimization: Adjust my resume keywords for each specific job description to pass ATS (Applicant Tracking Systems).



Tracking: Update a shared Google Sheet daily with: Company Name, Job Title, Link to Posting, and Date Applied.



Requirements:



Excellent written English and attention to detail.



Experience with ATS-friendly resume formatting.



High level of integrity (handling personal information).



Reliability: You must be able to work 10–20 hours per week consistently.



How to Apply:



Send a link to your resume.



Tell me about a time you helped someone (or yourself) get hired for a remote role.



Use the subject line "SUCCESS BONUS" so I know you understand the pay structure.

title: Reddit Karma Farmer
description:
Job Title: Reddit Karma Farmer



Location: Remote

Department: Marketing / Growth

Reports To: Head of Marketing



Job Overview



We are looking for a Reddit Community Growth Specialist with extensive experience building and managing Reddit accounts with strong karma and credibility. This role focuses on strategically posting, engaging, and contributing to relevant communities to drive awareness and traffic while maintaining strict adherence to Reddit community rules.



The ideal candidate understands Reddit culture, subreddit dynamics, and moderation standards, and can consistently create content that resonates with communities without appearing promotional or spammy.



Key Responsibilities

Reddit Account & Karma Development



Build and maintain Reddit accounts with high karma and positive community reputation.



Develop long-term strategies for organic karma growth through valuable contributions.



Maintain multiple accounts responsibly while ensuring authenticity and credibility.



Content Strategy & Posting



Identify relevant subreddits aligned with company niches and target audiences.



Create and post engaging content including:



Text posts



Discussion threads



Informational content



Visual posts and links (where allowed)



Tailor content to match the tone and culture of each subreddit.



Community Engagement



Participate in conversations by commenting, answering questions, and contributing value.



Build trust within communities through consistent, authentic interaction.



Monitor subreddit rules and moderation policies to ensure compliance.



Research & Trend Monitoring



Track trending discussions and emerging topics across relevant subreddits.



Identify opportunities to contribute content that naturally fits ongoing conversations.



Monitor competitor activity and community sentiment.



Risk & Compliance Management



Follow all subreddit guidelines and Reddit platform policies.



Ensure posts and engagement remain community-first rather than promotional.



Identify and avoid behaviors that could lead to account warnings, removals, or bans.



Performance Tracking



Track metrics such as:



Karma growth



Post engagement



Comment visibility



Traffic generated from Reddit



Provide periodic reports on successful posts, communities, and strategies.



Requirements

Experience



2+ years experience actively using Reddit with demonstrable karma growth.



Proven ability to post content that gains traction within subreddits.



Strong understanding of Reddit etiquette, moderation culture, and community norms.



Skills



Excellent written communication and storytelling ability.



Strong understanding of online communities and viral content dynamics.



Ability to identify content angles that naturally fit discussions.



Strong research and trend analysis skills.



Preferred Qualifications



Experience with content marketing or community management.



Familiarity with tools used for monitoring subreddit activity and trends.



Experience driving traffic or awareness through Reddit communities.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



Karma growth across managed accounts



Engagement rates on posts and comments



Successful participation across target subreddits



Traffic or leads attributed to Reddit activity



Consistent compliance with subreddit rules



What Success Looks Like



Accounts maintain strong reputation and steady karma growth.



Posts generate meaningful engagement and discussion.



Content integrates naturally into subreddit conversations.



Communities view the account as a genuine contributor rather than a promoter.

title: Medical Billing, Claims Processing and Collection Specialist
description:
About This Job: 

OptiMindHealth is a mental health and wellness counseling company. We are a group of doctors, psychologists, and clinical social workers committed to improving the psychological health and wellbeing of our patients. We are supported by a hard-working and devoted staff who help us in all aspects of practice operations.   



We’re looking for a detail oriented and solutions focused Medical Billing, Claims Processing, and Collections Specialist to join our growing remote support team. You will play a pivotal role in keeping the practice financial operations running smoothly, ensuring accurate billing, timely claims resolution, and compassionate support that enhances the experience of every patient and provider we serve.  



 Roles & Responsibilities   



1. Medical Billing & Claims Processing:   



- Accurately code and submit claims for all practice clinicians, ensuring proper use of CPT, ICD10, and other required coding standards.  

- Audit provider documentation for each patient encounter to verify that the clinical documentation fully supports the CPT code(s) billed, ensuring compliance with payer requirements and minimizing risk of denials or recoupments.  

- Conduct timely insurance eligibility and benefits verification to help patients understand financial responsibility before or after services.  

- Review, track, and follow up on claim denials, rejections, and delayed claims; submit appeals as needed to ensure timely reimbursement  

- Monitor unresponsive or pending claims, proactively resolving issues to minimize aging accounts and improve revenue cycle efficiency.  

- Manage insurance credentialing and enrollment for new providers, ensuring all required documents and payer applications are completed, submitted, and tracked.  

- Support continuous improvement of billing processes, identifying patterns, inefficiencies, or training needs.  



2. Accounting & Collections:   



- Provide compassionate, high quality customer support via
, chat, and phone—helping patients navigate billing questions with clarity and empathy.  

- Support patients in resolving outstanding balances, offering guidance on payment plans, statements, or insurance explanations of benefits (EOBs)

- Generate and issue billing statements and invoices, ensuring accuracy and clarity for patients and internal stakeholders.  

- Document all communication thoroughly and accurately, maintaining clear records that support smooth follow up and audit readiness.  

- Collaborate closely with our established remote support team, participating in shared workflows, tea
etings, and process improvements.  

- Assist with routine accounting tasks related to patient billing and collections, helping ensure financial operations run smoothly and transparently.  



Qualifications:  



- Demonstrated experience in medical billing and claims management is required, with strong preference for candidates familiar with mental health billing, payer rules, and common denial workflows.

- Experience in healthcare customer service or patient financial support is highly valued, especially in roles requiring empathy, professionalism, and clarity.  

- Background in accounting, collections, or bookkeeping is a strong plus, particularly experience with patient balance resolution and payment workflows.  

- Exceptional English communication skills, with the ability to convey information clearly, positively, and professionally across
, chat, and phone interactions.  

- Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to work respectfully and effectively with a culturally diverse team of clinicians, staff, and patients.  

- High level of attention to detail, with a commitment to accuracy, compliance, and completeness in all billing and documentation tasks.  

- Proactive problem solving mindset, able to navigate complex billing or insurance issues with persistence and initiative.  



Salary and Work Setup: 

The position is a permanent work from home arrangement, with additional details below. 

 

1. Base Salary: 45,000 PHP Monthly 

2. Commission-Based: No 

3. Payment Method: Twice Per Month 

4. Work Schedule: US Business Hours; Full-Time; 40 hours per week (No part-time) 

 

Benefits Package: 

Working at OptiMindHealth provides a stable work environment for staff members who excel and grow in their careers. Our benefits package includes: 

 

1. Government-mandated benefits (SSS, Pag-Ibig, PHIC) 

2. 13th Month Pay 

3. HMO Coverage 

4. Ten days of vacation per year 

5. Five days of sick leave allowed per year 

6. Philippine holidays observed 

 

Requirements:



To be considered for an interview, include the following in your application:  

- Up-to-date CV   

- Sample voice recording (at least 30 seconds in your natural speaking voice).

title: Marketing & AI Automation Specialist
description:
Marketing & AI Automation Specialist



Company: My Car Business Services LLC

Divisions: My Car Corporation (Dealership) & My Car Care Services (Auto Service Center)



My Car is seeking a highly capable Marketing & AI Automation Specialist who understands modern marketing and knows how to leverage AI tools, automation platforms, and digital strategies to generate leads and brand visibility.



This role is for someone who understands end-to-end marketing, not just social media posting. You will be responsible for building and managing marketing systems that generate leads, increase visibility, and support business growth.



The primary objectives of this role are:

• Lead generation

• Brand visibility

• Marketing automation and optimization



The candidate must be serious, committed, proactive, and able to work during Eastern Time Zone business hours.



 Key Responsibilities



Marketing Automation & CRM Management



• Manage and optimize our All In One Marketing platform (White Label of GoHighLevel)

• Build and manage workflows, automations, pipelines, triggers, and CRM processes

• Implement AI-driven marketing automation and lead nurturing systems

• Manage
 and SMS campaigns

• Track and improve lead conversion processes



 Website, Funnels & Landing Pages



• Build and maintain websites, landing pages, and sales funnels

• Optimize pages for lead generation and conversion

• Implement tracking, analytics, and optimization improvements

• Ensure websites and funnels align with marketing campaigns



Social Media Management & Content



• Manage posting across multiple social media platforms

• Create and publish content designed to increase brand visibility

• Use AI tools to assist with content strategy and production

• Schedule, manage, and monitor social media performance

• Boost posts strategically to increase reach and engagement



Paid Advertising & Lead Generation



• Plan and manage Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns

• Understand and implement strategic ad targeting and optimization

• Monitor campaign performance and optimize for lead generation

• Develop ad creatives and campaign messaging

• Implement retargeting strategies



SEO, AEO & GEO



• Implement Local SEO strategies

• Optimize Google Business profiles and local listings

• Implement AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) strategies

• Implement GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) for AI-driven search visibility

• Develop content that improves search visibility and discoverability



AI Tool Utilization



• Use AI tools to improve content creation, automation, analysis, and efficiency

• Identify opportunities to integrate AI into marketing workflows

• Continuously improve processes using AI and automation



Required Skills & Experience



• Experience with GoHighLevel or similar all-in-one marketing platforms

• Strong understanding of marketing automation and CRM systems

• Ability to build websites, funnels, and landing pages

• Experience managing Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns

• Strong knowledge of social media management and content strategy

• Experience with SEO, Local SEO, AEO, and GEO concepts

• Familiarity with AI tools used in modern marketing workflows

• Ability to analyze performance data and optimize campaigns

• Strong communication and organizational skills



 Work Expectations



• Must be available during Eastern Time Zone business hours

• Must be dedicated, responsive, and reliable

• Must be able to work independently and take ownership of marketing initiatives

• Clear communication and accountability are required



This role requires someone who takes marketing seriously and understands that consistent execution and strategy are key to growth



Our Goal



We are building a strong marketing system that continuously generates qualified leads and strong brand visibility for both divisions of our business.



We are looking for someone who can build, manage, and continuously improve this system.

title: UGC & Performance Video Editor (Meta/TikTok) – VSL + AI
description:
We’re Noley — modern wellness gummies (Calm, Sleep, Mood, Focus). We create warm, clean, conversion-first ads for women 30–45.



*Role (Part-time to start)*

20 hrs/week to start (paid), with potential to grow to full-time. You’ll turn raw UGC into high-performing ad creatives and build VSL-style ads for Meta/TikTok.



*What you’ll do*

- Edit raw UGC into *ad-ready videos* (9:16 primary; also 1:1 / 4:5 when needed)

- Create *VSL-style ads* (hook ? problem ? solution ? proof ? CTA)

- Add *captions, punch-ins, b-roll, sound design, pacing* + pattern interrupts

- Produce *variants* per concept (different hooks/CTAs/lengths: 15s/30s/45s/60s + cutdowns)

- Use AI tools when useful for *b-roll, filler scenes, product shots, recreations*

- Keep files organized (clean naming, versions, folders) and iterate based on feedback/performance



*Tools*

Premiere / After Effects / CapCut / DaVinci / Final Cut — any is fine. AI tools welcome (Runway, Pika, Midjourney, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Descript, etc.).



*Must-haves*

- Proven experience editing *UGC for paid ads* (Meta/TikTok)

- Strong retention editing: hooks, clarity, fast pacing

- Clean, modern style (not messy/over-edited)

- Reliable communication + good English

- Organized workflow + fast turnaround



*Nice to have*

Supplements/wellness DTC experience, basic motion graphics, Meta compliance awareness.



*How we work*

Remote/async with 2–4 hrs overlap with Amsterdam time. Clear briefs, quick feedback, on-time payments. *Short paid test* for finalists (1 raw UGC ? 2–3 ad variants).



*How to apply (reply in this exact format)*

1) Portfolio URL (required) — must include UGC ads you edited

2) Tools you use daily (editing + AI tools)

3) Rate (USD) + weekly availability (hours)

4) Timezone + typical working hours

5) One example you’re proud of: goal + what improved (CTR/CPA/hold rate or creative outcome)



Noley

title: Systems Analyst (L2)
description:
FusionTek is a Managed Service Provider (MSP) with offices in multiple US locations and tea
mbers globally. We’re a tight-knit team of friendly, intelligent people focused on IT infrastructure management for small- to mid-sized businesses since 2007.



We’re also rapidly growing and are looking for top-tier candidates who share our four core values:

We are team players, collectively working towards a common goal.

We work each day with a growth mindset focused on the success of our coworkers, clients, and the company.

We do the right thing with an honest and transparent approach that always puts our clients first.

We take ownership of our work, always seeing it through to completion.

If you align with these values and are looking to advance your career in a dynamic environment, we want to hear from you! 

We are seeking a Systems Analyst (L2) to join our expanding team.



As a Systems Analyst, you will be a crucial member of our support team, providing high-quality technical assistance to our clients. This role requires a deep understanding of desktop support and a proactive approach to resolving technical issues. You will be responsible for handling escalations from our first-level technicians and ensuring a timely resolution of more complex problems. Strong expertise in Windows and MacOS, as well as experience with cloud services such as Office 365, is essential.



Here’s what you’ll be doing:

Managing escalated support tickets, tackling everything from break/fix challenges to application setup and user-level configurations. Beyond providing exceptional end-user support, you'll also play a key role in enhancing our core infrastructure through server administration, networking, and security efforts.

Setting up new Hyper?V hosts, troubleshooting and deploying SonicWall firewalls, and managing Datto networking switches and access points. You’ll also work with a range of modern, innovative technologies that our team implements regularly.

Utilize our ticketing system to document, monitor, and escalate issues as needed, while maintaining clear and accurate documentation within our internal platform to ensure information remains current throughout the support process.

You'll be part of a close-knit team where collaboration is key, working alongside a talented technical group to provide outstanding remote support and service to our clients.



**This role is fully remote, offering the flexibility to work from anywhere. Working hours will be determined during the hiring process to ensure alignment with both business requirements and your availability.**



REQUIREMENTS

 Education & Certifications

CompTIA A+ and/or Network+ required

 (If you don’t currently hold one, you’ll be expected to earn it after hire — we’ll support you!)

MD?102 (Modern Desktop Administrator Associate) preferred



???? Technical Skills

3–5 years of IT support experience in an MSP or fast?paced technical environment

Strong proficiency with Windows 10/11 and macOS

Solid experience with Windows Server 2016, 2019, and 2022

Working knowledge of SonicWall firewalls, Datto networking, and core networking fundamentals

Familiarity with Microsoft 365, Office applications, and Office 365 cloud administration

Experience with Azure and/or AWS cloud environments

Hands-on experience with Datto BCDR and/or SaaS Backup solutions

Experience using Autotask PSA is a strong plus



???? Soft Skills & Professional Abilities

Outstanding written and verbal communication skills — you’ll interact with clients regularly

A proactive mindset and the ability to work independently or as part of a collaborative team

Strong time?management and organizational skills to balance multiple priorities effectively

A genuine desire to deliver excellent service and continuously improve



At FusionTek, we truly believe that our people are our most valuable asset. That's why we're proud to offer:

???? Competitive salary: $1,200 month/USD - $1,400 month/USD

???? Quarterly bonus eligibility to reward performance

???? Comprehensive benefits package

???? Paid time off and leave policies in line with Philippine standards

???? Educational reimbursement for certification exams and access to company-supplied training resources

???? Team culture: Fun events and opportunities to connect with colleagues

Schedule

title: Payor Contract/Contracting and Credential/Credentialing Specialist
description:
About Us:

We are a pioneering startup dedicated to transforming the landscape of autism diagnosis through remote evaluations. Our mission is to provide accessible, comprehensive, and accurate autism diagnostic services to individuals and families, regardless of their location. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our innovative team.



Role Overview:

We’re hiring a Contracting & Credentialing Specialist to manage provider enrollment and credentialing with payers. You’ll play a key role in expanding access and supporting provider readiness. 



Key Responsibilities:

+ Complete and maintain provider credentialing with commercial and Medicaid payers for behavioral health clinicians (e.g., clinical psychologists, speech language pathologists, occupational therapists)

+ Update and manage CAQH, payer portals, and other provider databases

+ Track and manage expirations, revalidation, and application timelines

+ Follow up with payers and resolve issues or delays

+ Support new provider onboarding from credentialing to active status

+ Maintain internal tracking systems and documentation (e.g., application timelines, fee schedules, contracts)





Qualifications:

+ 2+ years experience in provider credentialing, contracting, or payer enrollment (behavioral health strongly preferred)

+ Familiar with CAQH, Medicaid, and payer-specific portals (e.g., Optum, Evernorth)

+ Excellent organizational and follow-up skills

+ Remote-ready, detail-oriented, and proactive

+ Fluent in English; able to work EST or PST hours





What We Offer:

+ Competitive compensation

+ Flexible remote work

+ A supportive team and mission-driven environment

+ Growth opportunities – we are growing quickly and always looking to promote top-notch talent to leadership positions



+As part of the interview process, we will expect you to do a small presentation so please only apply if you are able to do a presentation. Also, as we get a lot of interview requests, in your request, please indicate why this would be a good opportunity for you, a little about your background and, most importantly, what is the answer to 3+9. Yes, its a very simple answer, but we want someone to pay attention to details and be interested in this job.

title: High-Level Sales Role – Real Estate Acquisitions (Not a VA Job)
description:
We’re looking for a sharp, full-time Acquisitions Rep to join our U.S.-based real estate investment team. This is not a basic VA role. We’re looking for a real salesperson who is confident on the phone, speaks excellent English, and can handle daily outbound calling with consistency.



This role focuses on a high-margin, specialized real estate niche (partial deeds / title issues), where we help families resolve ownership problems and unlock value in properties most investors don’t know how to work.



What You’ll Be Doing



This is a call-heavy, action-oriented role.



40–50% Research

• Reviewing documents, obituaries, court records, and county/tax sites

• Identifying heirs, next of kin, and true decision-makers

• Working with our internal research team to verify ownership and family trees



50–60% Outreach & Sales

• Making outbound calls every day (this is the core of the job)

• Sending texts and
s and leaving professional voi
s daily

• Speaking with family members, asking the right questions, and building trust

• Clearly explaining our process and next steps

• Updating the CRM and coordinating with the team



If you don’t like calling, following up, and talking to strangers, this is not a good fit.



Requirements (Important)



• Excellent English (spoken and written) – C1/C2 level only

• Minimum 5 years of sales experience

• Real estate experience strongly preferred (acquisitions, dispositions, wholesaling, probate, title, excess proceeds, etc.)

• Very comfortable with outbound calling, voi
s, and follow-ups

• Strong common sense and judgment when identifying the right person to speak with

• Strong internet connection, quiet workspace, and quality headset

• Comfortable using CRMs, Google,
, and research tools daily



Schedule & Availability



• Full-time, Monday–Friday

• Daily tea
eting at 10:00 AM Eastern Time

• Working hours: 10:00 AM – 7:30 PM Eastern Time

• Flexibility for follow-ups when needed



Compensation & Opportunity



• Base pay: $1,000–$1,500 per month (based on experience)

• Strong commissions on deals closed

• Based on current team performance and commission structure, this role has the potential to earn an additional $5,000+ per month in commissions once the pipeline is ramped

• One tea
mber is currently averaging about one deal per week with strong margins in this niche

• Full training provided

• Long-term opportunity to grow into a senior closer or leadership role



This is a performance-based role with real upside for the right person.



How to Apply



Send us a 1–2 minute video answering:

• Your sales and real estate experience

• Your comfort level with daily outbound calling

• Why you’d be good at finding and speaking with the right family decision-maker

• Your location and availability



We’re looking for driven, reliable, high-level salespeople who want to grow with a serious real estate team and make real money in a niche most people don’t understand.

title: Real Estate Title Company Assistant
description:
A Real Estate Title Assistant supports title officers and closers by preparing, organizing, and managing documents for real estate transactions, ensuring compliance, and clearing title defects. Key duties include conducting title searches, scheduling closings, communicating with stakeholders (agents, lenders, clients), and processing paperwork. 

Key Responsibilities

Document Preparation & Processing: Prepare, review, and organize documents such as deeds, affidavits, and closing disclosures.

Title Search & Clearing: Research public records to verify ownership and identify/clear liens or defects.

Closing Coordination: Schedule closings, coordinate with parties involved, and ensure all documents are ready.

Administrative Support: Handle correspondence, answer phones, scan, file, and manage data entry.

Your hours will be eastern standart time 9-5 Monday thru Friday

To be considered for this position, you must state that the owner of the business loves the color blue and submit a PDF copy of our resume.
